  • Galaxy Z Assurance: First two screen/parts replacements at Rs 999
  • Accessory Discounts: Up to 50% off on select Samsung covers and up to 35% off on Galaxy Watch Ultra, Watch 7, and Galaxy Buds 3 series.

With these advanced features and exclusive offers, the Galaxy Z Fold 6 and Z Flip 6 are set to make a significant impact in the Indian market. Pre-order now to take advantage of these deals and be among the first to experience Samsung's latest innovations.

wp:postmeta.wp:meta_value: Samsung Galaxy Z Fold 6 and Z Flip 6 launched in India with Snapdragon 8 Gen 3, enhanced design, and AI features. Pre-order now for exclusive offers!

item.title: WWDC: Everything You need to know!
item.dc:creator: divyanshsharma7117
item.content:encoded:
Apple is making headlines at the Worldwide Developers Conference (WWDC) with a significant announcement. According to a CNN report, Apple is set to ink a deal with OpenAI, the maker of ChatGPT, to introduce generative AI tools to the iPhone.

Enhancing User Experience

These AI-powered tools promise to enhance Apple's handheld devices' utility and user experience. AI integration could unlock unexplored potentials and pave the way for new iPhone features.

Potential Sales Boost Amid Challenges

The move into the AI segment could boost Apple iPhone sales, countering some of the company's setbacks, including regulatory scrutiny in Washington. Embracing AI may signal a new era of growth for Apple.

Unlocking iPhone Power with Generative AI

Apple CEO Tim Cook believes generative AI could unlock the true power of iPhone apps. This new technology frontier could redefine Apple’s approach to innovation and user engagement.

Existing iPhone Features Competing with AI

Even before this AI integration, the latest iPhones boast impressive features:

  1. Offline Maps: With iOS 17, users can download maps for offline use on Apple Maps, ensuring navigation without an internet connection.
  2. Live Voicemail: This feature transcribes voicemail messages in real-time, allowing users to read and even answer calls while the voicemail is being recorded.
  3. Visual Lookup: Users can identify buildings, flowers, and other objects in images, providing instant information at their fingertips.

Apple’s foray into generative AI tools marks a significant step forward, promising to elevate the user experience and potentially drive sales growth in the coming years.

item.title: Ambrane Launches New MagSafe Power Banks and Wireless Charger
item.dc:creator: divyanshsharma7117
item.content:encoded:
Ambrane Unveils Latest MagSafe Power Banks and Wireless Charger

Ambrane has launched two new sleek and stylish power banks, the AeroSync PB Prime and PB 11, along with the AeroSyncQ wireless charger. These releases come just before the Amazon Prime Day Sale starting on July 20.

AeroSync PB Prime

Designed for iPhone 12 and newer models, the AeroSync PB Prime ensures seamless MagSafe charging. It features a 10,000mAh battery, supporting 20W input and 22W Type-C output for fast charging. It supports PD 3.0, QC 3.0, and PPS protocols, ensuring versatile compatibility.

Specifications:

  • Capacity: 10,000mAh
  • Input: 20W
  • Output: Type-C: 22W Max., MagSafe: 15W
  • Max Output: 22W
  • Protocols Supported: PD 3.0, QC 3.0, PPS
  • Self-Charging: Up to 3.5hrs with 20W PD chargers
  • Ports: 1 Bi-Directional Type-C
  • Protection: Multi-layer chipset protection
  • Indicators: 5 LED indicators
  • Design: Premium, compact metal design
  • Warranty: 180 days

AeroSync PB 11

The AeroSync PB 11 also caters to iPhone 12 and newer models, featuring a 10,000mAh capacity with 22.5W output. It supports PD 3.0, QC 3.0, VOOC, and PPS charging protocols, offering multi-layer chipset protection for safe usage.

Specifications:

  • Capacity: 10,000mAh
  • MagSafe Output: 15W
  • Output: Type-C: 22W Max.; USB-A: 22.5W Max.
  • Max Output: 22.5W
  • Input: 20W Max.
  • Ports: 2 (Type-C & USB-A)
  • Charging Protocols: PD 3.0, QC 3.0, VOOC, PPS
  • Powerbank Charging Time: Approx. 3.5 hours with 20W PD chargers
  • Protection: Multi-layer chipset protection
  • Indicators: 5 LED indicators
  • Design: Compact with a stand
  • Warranty: 180 days

AeroSynQ Wireless Charger

The AeroSynQ wireless charger supports 15W Qi-2 and MagSafe wireless charging, ideal for iPhone 12 and newer models. It features a Type-C 20W input for efficient charging and comes with multi-layer chipset protection.

Specifications:

  • Wireless Compatibility: 15W Qi-2 & MagSafe
  • Input: Type-C 20W
  • Protection: Multi-layer chipset
  • Design: Compact and portable
  • Build: Sturdy construction
  • Cable: Includes a 60W braided cable
  • Warranty: 365 days

Pricing and Availability

  • AeroSync PB Prime: Rs. 2,299 (launch price), MRP Rs. 4,999, available in Orange, Titanium, Blue, Grey.
  • AeroSync PB 11: Rs. 1,999 (launch price), MRP Rs. 3,999, available in Black, Purple.
  • AeroSynQ Wireless Charger: Rs. 1,299 (launch price), MRP Rs. 2,999, available in Black.

These products are available for purchase on Amazon.in and the company’s website starting today.

wp:postmeta.wp:meta_value: Ambrane introduces the AeroSync PB Prime and PB 11 10000mAh MagSafe power banks and the AeroSyncQ wireless charger. Available on Amazon ahead of Prime Day.

item.title: U&i Uncovers Memory and Superior Series: Everything you need to know!
item.dc:creator: divyanshsharma7117
item.content:encoded:
U&i has launched two new categories of TWS earbuds in India: the U&i Memory Series and the U&i Superior Series, catering to different user needs with unique features and competitive pricing.

U&i Memory Series TWS Earbuds

The U&i Memory Series TWS Earbuds are perfect for music lovers needing extra storage. These earbuds feature a built-in MP3 player in the charging case with a microSD slot, allowing users to store and play music directly from the case. Control buttons on the case provide easy playback control.

Specifications:

  • Built-in MP3 Player: Charging case with microSD slot
  • Bluetooth: V5.3 + EDR chip
  • Microphone: Quad silicon mic for superior call quality
  • Battery Life: 50 hours total music and talk time
  • Earbud Battery: 60mAh, charging in 1 hour
  • Case Battery: 500mAh, charging in 2 hours

U&i Superior Series TWS Earbuds

The U&i Superior Series TWS Earbuds offer superior sound quality and convenience. They feature Bluetooth V5.3 + EDR for HiFi audio and a game mode for low latency, making them ideal for both music enthusiasts and gamers.

Specifications:

  • Bluetooth: V5.3 + EDR for HiFi audio
  • Game Mode: Low latency
  • Battery Life: 40 hours total music and talk time
  • Earbud Battery: 28mAh, charging in 1 hour
  • Case Battery: 320mAh with Type-C port, charging in 1.5 hours
  • Standby Time: 400 hours

Pricing and Availability

  • U&i Memory Series TWS Earbuds: Priced at Rs. 3,699, available in White, Grey, and Black.
  • U&i Superior Series TWS Earbuds: Priced at Rs. 2,499, available in Grey, Blue, and Black.

Both models are available for purchase at U&i outlets and major retail stores across India starting today.

wp:postmeta.wp:meta_value: U&i introduces Memory and Superior Series TWS earbuds with built-in MP3 player and HiFi audio. Available now in India.

item.title: HONOR 200 & 200 Pro Full Phone Specifications, Price
item.dc:creator: divyanshsharma7117
item.content:encoded:
HONOR 200 Series Launch: AI-Driven Innovation

HTech has officially launched the HONOR 200 and HONOR 200 Pro smartphones in India, featuring advanced AI capabilities and high-end specifications. Both models boast a 6.7-inch 1.5K 120Hz curved OLED display with HDR brightness of 4000 nits and 3840Hz risk-free PWM dimming.

Powerful Performance and Enhanced Connectivity

The HONOR 200 is powered by the Snapdragon 7 Gen 3 SoC, while the HONOR 200 Pro packs the Snapdragon 8s Gen 3 SoC. Both devices integrate HONOR’s self-developed RF-enhanced chip C1+, which ensures superior telecommunication capabilities and seamless internet connectivity.

Advanced Cooling System

The smartphones employ a stainless steel vapor chamber with a 36,881mm² dissipation area, providing a 10% increase over the HONOR 90. They run on Android 14-based MagicOS 8.0, featuring AI enhancements, with a promise of 3 Android OS updates and 4 years of security updates.

Cutting-Edge Camera Technology

The HONOR 200 Pro shines with a 50MP Portrait Main Camera equipped with a 1/1.3-inch Super Dynamic H9000 sensor, dual stabilization technology, and 4-in-1 pixel binning. It also includes a 50MP Telephoto Camera, a 12MP ultra-wide lens, and dual front cameras optimized for Indian skin tones.

Similarly, the HONOR 200 features a 50MP camera with a 1/1.56-inch Sony IMX906 sensor and a 50MP Telephoto Camera with Sony IMX856 sensor, ensuring detailed zoom shots.

Long-Lasting Battery and Fast Charging

Both models come with a 5200mAh silicon-carbon battery and AI power-saving, promising over 60 hours of uninterrupted music playback. The HONOR 200 Pro supports 100W wired and 66W wireless HONOR SuperCharge, fully charging the device in 41 minutes.

Pricing and Availability

The HONOR 200 is available in Moonlight White and Black, priced at Rs. 34,999 (8GB + 256GB) and Rs. 39,999 (12GB + 512GB). The HONOR 200 Pro comes in Ocean Cyan and Black, priced at Rs. 57,999 (12GB + 512GB). Both phones will be available from Amazon.in, offline stores, and Explorehonor.com starting July 20th.

Launch Offers and Discounts

During the Amazon Prime Day Sale on July 20-21, customers can avail an instant discount of Rs. 1000 (HONOR 200) and Rs. 8000 (HONOR 200 Pro). Additional discounts are available for ICICI and SBI Bank credit cardholders. JIO customers can enjoy benefits worth Rs. 2250 on the HONOR 200 Series.

Statements from Leaders

Madhav Sheth, CEO, HTech:

"The HONOR 200 Series marks a significant leap in AI-driven mobile technology, enhancing and simplifying user experiences."

Ranjit Babu, Director, Wireless and Home Entertainment, Amazon India:

"The HONOR 200 series is a perfect choice for photography enthusiasts, offering advanced camera capabilities and intelligent software."

With these compelling features and offers, the HONOR 200 series is set to redefine user experiences with cutting-edge AI technology.

wp:postmeta.wp:meta_value: HTech launches HONOR 200 & 200 Pro in India with AI, Snapdragon 7/8s Gen 3, 50MP cameras, and 100W fast charging. Available from July 20.

item.title: Wearable Technology Revolutionized by Smart Patch Tech
item.dc:creator: divyanshsharma7117
item.content:encoded:
Wearable technology has seen limited innovation recently, especially in biosensing capabilities. However, researchers at Nanyang Technological University (NTU) in Singapore have made a breakthrough with a new smart patch that analyzes sweat to find biomarkers

Cutting-Edge Sweat Analysis

The smart patch, which resembles a Band-Aid, uses a hydrogel-based film with chemical receptacles to measure lactate, urea, and glucose levels. This method, detailed in the journal Analytical Chemistry, is completely non-invasive.

A tiny laser, central to the sensor, wrapped in liquid crystal droplets, controls the laser's function. This assembly and a soft hydrogel ensure the patch remains flexible and comfortable.

Unparalleled Accuracy

The team claims this wearable sensor is the first to detect and measure various chemicals in sweat with exceptional accuracy. It captures data from tiny to large concentrations and delivers results in minutes via a smartphone app, making it more convenient than visiting a clinic.

Implications for Health Monitoring

Professor Chen Yu-Cheng from NTU's School of Electrical and Electronic Engineering (EEE) highlights the patch's potential for diabetic patients. Unlike current methods, it offers a quick and pleasant way to monitor health without invasive procedures.

Industry Impact

Currently, companies like Apple and Samsung are racing to perfect smartwatch-based glucose analysis. However, NTU's smart patch offers a standalone solution with broader applications, such as monitoring urea and lactate levels, which can indicate diabetes-related issues and workout intensities.

Future Prospects

Despite its current form not being integrable with smartwatches, the smart patch could inspire new product categories in wearable biosensing. Brands like Ultrahuman already offer sensor-equipped skin patches, showing the market's potential.

NTU's innovation opens the door to non-invasive, accurate health monitoring, pushing the boundaries of wearable technology.

wp:postmeta.wp:meta_value: Discover the future of wearable technology with a smart patch from NTU Singapore that non-invasively measures health biomarkers in sweat.

item.title: Apple iOS 18 Beta: Everything you need to know!
item.dc:creator: divyanshsharma7117
item.content:encoded:
iOS 18 Beta Released: AI Enhancements and Customizations

Apple has released the iOS 18 in developer beta and the first public beta version is now available too. The stable public release is expected around mid-to-late September, following the iPhone 16 launch.

New Features in iOS 18

Apple Intelligence AI Tools

iOS 18 introduces advanced AI features called Apple Intelligence, including:

  • Writing assistance
  • Summarization
  • Image generation

AI-Powered Siri

Siri now features:

  • Enhanced control over native apps
  • Improved contextual understanding
  • Integration with ChatGPT for queries

Home Screen Customization

Users can now:

  • Place icons and widgets freely
  • Customize app icons with a tint
  • Customize Lock screen controls and Control Center layout

Additional Features

  • Revamped Photos app
  • New messaging features like word effects
  • RCS message support in select regions

Eligible iPhone Models

  • iPhone 15, 15 Plus, 15 Pro, 15 Pro Max
  • iPhone 14, 14 Plus, 14 Pro, 14 Pro Max
  • iPhone 13, 13 mini, 13 Pro, 13 Pro Max
  • iPhone 12, 12 mini, 12 Pro, 12 Pro Max
  • iPhone 11, 11 Pro, 11 Pro Max
  • iPhone XS, XS Max, XR
  • iPhone SE (2nd generation or later)

Anticipated Release Timeline

The stable iOS 18 release is likely between September 16-23, following the iPhone 16 series launch. This aligns with previous release schedules, with iOS 17 released on September 18, 2023, and iOS 16 on September 16, 2022.

Stay tuned for more updates as Apple rolls out these exciting new features and improvements.

wp:postmeta.wp:meta_value: Apple releases iOS 18 beta with AI tools, Siri enhancements, and new customization features. Expected public release in September.

item.title: Custom Duty Reduction on Mobile Phones, What happens now?
item.dc:creator: divyanshsharma7117
item.content:encoded:
India Slashes Customs Duty on Mobile Phones and Accessories

Finance Minister Nirmala Sitharaman announced a significant Custom Duty Reduction on mobile phones, mobile PCBAs, and mobile chargers from 20% to 15%. This move aims to further boost the Indian mobile industry, which has seen substantial growth in recent years.

Custom Duty Reduction to give Boost to Domestic Production

Sitharaman highlighted that domestic production of mobile phones has increased threefold, and exports have surged 100-fold over the last six years. This reduction in customs duty is expected to benefit consumers and strengthen the industry's growth trajectory.

Custom Duty Reduction: Encouraging Domestic Manufacturing

Earlier this month, a Mint report revealed the government's plan to cut customs duties on consumer electronics to promote domestic manufacturing, reduce import dependence, and enhance value addition in the sector.

Previous Duty Reductions

In January, the Union government reduced import duties on several mobile phone components from 15% to 10%. These components include battery covers, main lenses, back covers, antennas, SIM sockets, and other mechanical parts made of plastic and metal.

Industry Insights

Industry analyst Abhilash Kumar shared his perspective with HT Tech, noting that the sub ₹10,000 segment might see increased activity as affordable 5G chipsets from Qualcomm, MediaTek, and Unisoc become available. He expects minimal impact on the mid-segment and anticipates potential price reductions during festive sales due to financial tie-ups with e-commerce platforms like Flipkart and Amazon.

Conclusion

The reduction in customs duty on mobile phones and accessories is a strategic move to bolster the Indian mobile industry's growth. With increased domestic production and exports, consumers can expect more affordable mobile devices in the near future

wp:postmeta.wp:meta_value: Finance Minister Nirmala Sitharaman announces a custom duty reduction on mobile phones

item.title: Acer Aspire 3D 15 Laptop in India, What makes it unique?
item.dc:creator: divyanshsharma7117
item.content:encoded:
Acer Aspire 3D 15 Spatial Labs Edition Launched in India: Price, Features, Key Specs

Acer has launched its Aspire 3D 15 Spatial Labs Edition laptop in India, designed for 3D rendering and creative tasks. This laptop features a 4K display, a 13th-gen Intel CPU, and dedicated graphics up to RTX 4050.

Price and Availability

The Acer Aspire 3D 15 Spatial Labs Edition is available in two variants:

  • i5-13420H + RTX 2050: Rs 1,49,999
  • i7-13620H + RTX 4050: Rs 1,74,999

You can purchase it from the Acer website, Flipkart, and partner retail stores across India starting July 23.

Key Features and Specifications

The Aspire 3D 15 is packed with features tailored for 3D design and rendering tasks:

Display

  • 15.6-inch IPS LCD with 4K resolution (3840×2160 pixels)
  • 3D Stereoscopic Module: 1920×2160 resolution in 3D mode

Performance

  • CPU: 13th-gen Intel Core i5-13420H or Core i7-13620H
  • GPU: Nvidia RTX 2050 4GB GDDR6 or RTX 4050 6GB GDDR6
  • RAM: 16GB dual-channel DDR5 (upgradeable to 32GB)
  • Storage: 512GB or 1TB PCIe Gen4 NVMe SSD

Special Features

  • Spatial Labs 3D Technology: Switch seamlessly between 2D and 3D models with eye-tracking for enhanced 3D perception.
  • Acer Sense: Dashboard for fan speed, temperature, and clock speed.
  • Acer PurifiedView: Adjusts webcam settings based on lighting.
  • Acer Temporal Noise Reduction (TNR): Reduces noise in webcam videos.
  • DTS Ultrasound: Enhances audio quality.

Other Specs

  • Ports: 2x USB 3.2, 1x USB 3.2 Gen 1, 1x Thunderbolt 4, 1x HDMI, Ethernet
  • Battery: 57Wh with a 135W charger
  • Weight: 2.32kg

This laptop is engineered to handle demanding 3D rendering tasks with advanced eye-tracking technology, stereoscopic 3D displays, and robust cooling systems for extended usage

wp:postmeta.wp:meta_value: Acer launches the Aspire 3D 15 Spatial Labs Edition laptop in India.

item.title: Motorola: World's Slimmest Military-Grade Smartphone, Everything you need to know
item.dc:creator: divyanshsharma7117
item.content:encoded:
Motorola is set to launch another innovative smartphone, adding to its recent releases. The brand recently introduced the Moto G85, Motorola Edge 50 Ultra, and Motorola Razr 50 Ultra in India. Now, a new device has been teased, promising solid durability and a sleek design, and is available exclusively on Flipkart.

World's Slimmest Military-Grade Phone

Motorola's teaser video claims the upcoming smartphone is designed to endure the toughest conditions. It boasts the title of the world's slimmest MIL-STD-810H-certified smartphone, ensuring it can withstand accidental drops, extreme temperatures, and humidity.

Features and Specifications

The new Motorola device will be only 7.68mm thick and feature an IP54 rating, providing resistance against dust and water. It is expected to have a large display with curved frames for a better grip. The back might feature a matte finish, common in many of Motorola's recent models.

Leaks suggest that this could be the Motorola Edge 50 Neo, though official details are yet to be confirmed.

Possible Pricing and Comparison

If the new phone follows the pricing of its predecessor, the Motorola Edge 40 Neo, it could be in a similar range of Rs 23,999. The Edge 40 Neo features a 6.55-inch pOLED curved display with a 144Hz refresh rate, an IP68 rating, and Wi-Fi 6e support, ideal for gaming.

Powered by a MediaTek Dimensity 7030 processor, the Edge 40 Neo includes a 50-megapixel primary camera with OIS, a 13-megapixel ultra-wide-angle lens, and a 32-megapixel front camera. It also packs a 5,000mAh battery with a 68W fast charger and guarantees two OS upgrades along with three years of security updates.

Stay tuned for more updates as Motorola gears up for another exciting launch.

wp:postmeta.wp:meta_value: Motorola new device promises unmatched durability and a sleek design. Launching soon on Flipkart, the world's slimmest MIL-STD-810H certified phone.

item.title: Vi One Service: Broadband, Streaming, Everything about it
item.dc:creator: divyanshsharma7117
item.content:encoded:
Vodafone Idea (Vi) has introduced Vi One, a new service bundling mobile, broadband, and streaming services into one plan. In partnership with Asianet, Vi offers this integrated solution to customers in Kerala, providing a seamless experience.

Comprehensive Connectivity and Entertainment

Vi One combines Vi’s mobile services with Asianet’s broadband offerings, ensuring customers don’t need separate payments. This service also includes subscriptions to over 13 streaming platforms like Disney+ Hotstar, SonyLIV, and more.

Plan Details

Vi One offers two plans:

  • Rs 2,499 Quarterly / Rs 9,555 Annually: 40Mbps broadband speed
  • Rs 3,399 Quarterly / Rs 12,955 Annually: Higher broadband speed

Both plans include unlimited broadband data, 2GB daily mobile data with unlimited access between 12 am and 6 am, 2GB extra data monthly, weekend data rollover up to 200GB, unlimited calls, and 100 daily SMS on the Vi number.

Streaming Services Included

Subscribers get free access to:

  • Disney+ Hotstar
  • Manorama Max
  • SonyLIV
  • KLIKK
  • Fancode
  • NammaFlix
  • Chaupal
  • Atrangi
  • ULLU
  • PlayFlix
  • Hungama
  • Shemaroo
  • YuppTV

Subscription Process

New and existing Vi customers in Kerala can subscribe through the MyVi app or visit a Vi store. New customers must choose a Vi number, provide KYC details, and apply for SIM delivery and broadband installation.

Statements from Executives

“This integrated proposition sets a new standard for value and convenience, enabling our customers to get all their connectivity and entertainment needs met through a single subscription,” said Avneesh Khosla, Chief Marketing Officer at Vi.

Asianet MD and CEO, Murthy Chaganti, added, “In combining mobile services, entertainment services, and our broadband services, we are expanding our customer-centric products even further.”

Vi One aims to enhance customer experience by offering a comprehensive package, streamlining connectivity and entertainment needs in one convenient plan.

wp:postmeta.wp:meta_value: Vi One combines mobile, broadband, and OTT services in one plan, offering unlimited data, calls, and streaming from 13 platforms.

item.title: "How Wearable Tech is Transforming Health & Fitness Today"
item.dc:creator: divyanshsharma7117
item.content:encoded:
Wearable technology has rapidly emerged as a health and fitness industry transformative force. From smartwatches and fitness trackers to advanced biosensors, these devices are revolutionizing how we monitor our health, stay fit, and gain personalized insights into our well-being.

Mr. Udit Aggarwal on Wearable Technology

Mr. Udit Aggarwal, CEO of Boston Levin, recently spoke to The Hans India about the transformative impact of wearable technology on health and fitness. He delved into the myriad benefits, practical applications, and exciting future developments of wearable technology.

Benefits of Wearable Technology

Wearable technology offers numerous benefits that make it indispensable for health and fitness enthusiasts. These devices provide real-time data and actionable insights, empowering individuals to take control of their health.

1. Continuous Monitoring

Wearables provide continuous monitoring of vital health metrics such as heart rate, sleep patterns, and physical activity levels. This allows users to track their health data over time and identify trends or anomalies.

2. Personalized Insights

By analyzing collected data, wearables offer personalized health insights and recommendations. These tailored suggestions help users make informed decisions about their lifestyle, diet, and exercise routines.

3. Motivation and Accountability

Fitness trackers and smartwatches include features like goal setting, progress tracking, and social sharing. These tools motivate users to stay active and hold themselves accountable for their fitness goals.

4. Early Detection

Advanced wearables can detect early signs of health issues, such as irregular heartbeats or sleep apnea. Early detection allows for timely medical intervention, potentially preventing serious health problems.

Real-World Applications

The real-world applications of wearable technology in health and fitness are vast and varied. These devices are being used by individuals, healthcare providers, and fitness professionals to enhance health outcomes and promote active lifestyles.

1. Fitness Tracking

Devices like Fitbit, Boston Levin Infinity Smartwatch, and Apple Watch monitor steps, distance, calories burned, and active minutes, helping users maintain an active lifestyle.

2. Health Monitoring

Wearables such as the Withings ScanWatch and BioBeat monitor vital signs including heart rate, blood pressure, and oxygen saturation. These metrics are crucial for managing chronic conditions like hypertension and diabetes.

3. Sleep Analysis

Sleep tracking devices monitor sleep stages and provide insights to improve sleep hygiene and overall well-being.

4. Stress Management

Wearables with stress monitoring features measure physiological responses to stress. They offer guided breathing exercises and mindfulness activities to help users manage stress effectively.

5. Rehabilitation and Recovery

In healthcare, wearables track the progress of patients recovering from injuries or surgeries, providing valuable data to physiotherapists.

Future Developments

The future of wearable technology holds exciting possibilities, with ongoing advancements set to revolutionize health and fitness further.

1. Enhanced Accuracy

Future wearables will feature improved sensors and algorithms, providing more accurate health metrics and insights.

2. Integration with Healthcare Systems

As wearables become more sophisticated, they will integrate seamlessly with electronic health records (EHRs) and healthcare systems, facilitating better communication and personalized treatment plans.

3. Advanced Biometrics

Next-generation wearables will incorporate advanced biometrics like continuous glucose monitoring, hydration levels, and real-time blood pressure tracking.

4. Artificial Intelligence

AI-powered wearables will analyze vast amounts of health data to provide predictive analytics and personalized recommendations, enhancing health maintenance.

5. Wearable Ecosystems

Companies are developing ecosystems of interconnected wearable devices that provide holistic health insights, offering a complete picture of an individual's health.

Conclusion

Wearable technology is revolutionizing health and fitness by providing continuous monitoring, personalized insights, and motivation. Its real-world applications are making significant impacts on individual health and the broader healthcare landscape. As technology advances, wearables will become even more integral to our daily lives, promising a healthier and more informed world.

item.title: Google Pixel 9 Series will be Launching August 13th
item.dc:creator: divyanshsharma7117
item.content:encoded:
Google Pixel 9 series is set to launch on August 13, 2024, introducing four speculated models: Pixel 9, Pixel 9 Pro, Pixel 9 Pro XL, and Pixel 9 Pro Fold. The tech giant has confirmed the Pixel 9 Pro and Pixel 9 Pro Fold in recent teasers. This launch is expected to bring significant upgrades in design, hardware, software, and AI, making the Pixel 9 series highly competitive in the flagship market.

Early Launch and Confirmed Models

Google is launching the Pixel 9 series earlier than its usual October schedule. This change aligns with the confirmed models: Pixel 9, Pixel 9 Pro, Pixel 9 Pro XL, and Pixel 9 Pro Fold. The Pixel 9 Pro Fold is particularly notable, marking Google's continued venture into foldable technology.

Expected Upgrades and Features

1. Design and Display

The Pixel 9 series will feature major design changes. Display sizes are tweaked: the Pixel 9 with a 6.24-inch display, the Pixel 9 Pro with a 6.34-inch display, and the Pixel 9 Pro XL with a 6.73-inch display. These models may support the Adaptive Touch feature and include an ultrasonic fingerprint sensor. Google has redesigned the camera module, confirmed in their recent teaser.

2. Camera Enhancements

The Pixel 9 series is expected to feature a new camera sensor with telephoto capabilities. Upgrades are anticipated for the main and ultra-wide camera sensors compared to the Pixel 8 series. The front-facing camera may include auto-focus capabilities, enhancing selfie quality.

3. Performance and AI Features

Powered by the latest Tensor G4 processor based on Samsung’s Exynos silicon, the Pixel 9 series will offer improved performance and enhanced AI processing. Expected AI features include an upgraded Circle to Share, current Galaxy AI features, and a new "Add me" feature for group shots. Additional AI enhancements like Pixel Screenshots and image extenders may also be introduced.

4. Android 15

Google may roll out Android 15 alongside the Pixel 9 series, offering new features and customization options to enhance user experience.

Conclusion

The Google Pixel 9 series is poised to revolutionize the smartphone market with its advanced design, powerful AI capabilities, and enhanced camera features. While we await the official launch on August 13, these speculated upgrades paint an exciting picture for Google's latest flagship series. Stay tuned for the official announcements to confirm these features and more.

wp:postmeta.wp:meta_value: Google Pixel 9 series launches August 13 with Pixel 9, 9 Pro, 9 Pro XL, and Pixel 9 Pro Fold. Discover expected upgrades in design, AI, and cameras.

item.title: OnePlus Nord Buds 3 Pro: Affordable Premium Experience
item.dc:creator: divyanshsharma7117
item.content:encoded:
Introduction

Wireless earphones have become incredibly popular, with True Wireless Stereo (TWS) options leading the charge. The listening experience can vary significantly depending on the brand and model, often improving with price. However, OnePlus aims to challenge this notion with the Nord Buds 3 Pro, offering a premium experience without the hefty price tag, particularly for Nord smartphone users.

Design and Build Quality

Most TWS earphones mimic AirPods to some extent, and the Nord Buds 3 Pro are no exception. They feature stem-shaped earbuds and a pebble-shaped carry case. The Starry Black variant stands out with its stylish and elegant look. The uniquely shaped stem makes touch controls easily accessible.

User Experience

Switching from the Galaxy Buds FE, I appreciated the physical button on the carry case for pairing with new devices. Despite being budget earbuds, the Nord Buds 3 Pro exudes a solid build quality, particularly noticeable in the sturdy hinge of the case.

The ear tips are designed to ensure a snug fit, which is crucial for effective active noise cancellation (ANC). During my daily activities, including walking, jogging, and running, the earbuds stayed securely in place without needing adjustments.

Compatibility and Customization

The OnePlus Nord Buds 3 Pro pairs seamlessly with OnePlus smartphones, offering customization options without needing additional apps. For other Android devices and iPhones, the HeyMelody app enables further customization. These earbuds leverage Bluetooth 5.4 for an extended range and stable connection.

Performance and Features

Testing the Buds 3 Pro primarily with the Nord 4 smartphone revealed a smooth pairing process via Google FastPair and easy customization. The earbuds also performed well with the iPhone 15, supporting the AAC codec for high-quality audio. Customizing bass, audio, and ANC through the HeyMelody app was straightforward. The only downside is the lack of high-resolution codecs like LDAC or aptX.

Conclusion

The OnePlus Nord Buds 3 Pro delivers a premium experience at an affordable price, challenging the notion that higher cost always means better quality. With solid build quality, comfortable fit, and seamless integration with OnePlus devices, these earbuds are a great choice for budget-conscious consumers seeking high performance.

wp:postmeta.wp:meta_value: Discover the OnePlus Nord Buds 3 Pro, offering premium features at an affordable price. Read our hands-on review for insights on its performance and value.

item.title: Jio Bharat J1 4G: Everything you need to know
item.dc:creator: divyanshsharma7117
item.content:encoded:
Jio Bharat J1 4G: Affordable and Feature-Packed

Amazon has launched a new variant of the Jio Bharat phone, the Jio Bharat J1 4G, priced at Rs 1,799. This model follows the Jio Bharat B2 and B1, available in India alongside the Jio Bharat K1 Karbonn and V2. The Jio Bharat J1 4G is exclusive to Amazon and not listed on Reliance Digital or JioMart.

Key Features

The Jio Bharat J1 4G boasts a 2.8-inch display, providing a larger screen for an improved user experience. It supports HD calling and UPI payments through JioMoney, along with access to OTT services like Jio Cinema. The removable 2,500mAh battery ensures long-lasting usage on a single charge.

Additional Specifications

  • Audio and Camera: Includes a 3.5mm audio jack and a 0.3MP camera.
  • Extras: Features a torch, FM radio, and expandable storage up to 128GB.
  • SIM and Language Support: The phone is Jio SIM-locked, supports a single SIM, and offers 23 Indian languages.
  • 4G VoLTE: Ensures clear voice calls over Jio’s 4G network.
  • Preloaded Apps: Comes with Jio apps, including JioPay for UPI payments.

Comparison and Value

The Jio Bharat J1 4G, priced at Rs 1,799, offers more features compared to the Jio Bharat B2. It remains a budget-friendly option for users seeking modern capabilities in a feature phone. The JioPhone Prima, priced at Rs 2,599, is Jio’s premium feature phone.

Conclusion

The Jio Bharat J1 4G, with its affordable price, essential features, and support for Jio’s robust 4G network, provides an economical and functional mobile option for Jio users. It’s an excellent choice for those looking for a budget-friendly phone with modern features.

wp:postmeta.wp:meta_value: Discover the new Jio Bharat J1 4G with a 2.8-inch display and 2,500mAh battery. It is priced at Rs 1,799 on Amazon.

item.title: Xiaomi Mix Flip to Debut in Europe: A New Challenger in the Foldable Market
item.dc:creator: divyanshsharma7117
item.content:encoded:
Xiaomi Mix Flip Set for European Launch After August 15

Xiaomi's entry into the clamshell foldable phone market, the Xiaomi Mix Flip, is poised to debut in Europe soon. Mobile Bulgaria says the phone will launch in Eastern Europe after August 15th, hinting at an early August release.

Launch Details and Pricing

Xiaomi's country manager for Bulgaria confirmed the launch window, revealing an expected retail price of BGN 2,600 (roughly Rs 1,21,000) for the European market. This pricing places the Xiaomi Mix Flip higher than Samsung's Galaxy Z Flip 6, which starts at EUR 1,200 (approximately Rs 1,10,000) in Europe.

Key Features of Xiaomi Mix Flip

Launched in China earlier this month, the Xiaomi Mix Flip comes with impressive specifications:

  • Processor: Qualcomm Snapdragon 8 Gen 3.
  • Displays: 6.86-inch 1.5K foldable AMOLED inner display (120Hz refresh rate) and a 4.01-inch 1.5K AMOLED outer display.
  • Cameras: 50MP dual rear cameras (Leica-tuned), 32MP front-facing camera.
  • RAM: Up to 16GB.
  • Storage: Up to 1TB UFS 4.0.
  • Battery: 4,780mAh with 67W fast charging.
  • Software: Android 14-based HyperOS.

Competitive Edge

The Xiaomi Mix Flip's European launch marks the company's entry into a competitive foldable phone market dominated by Samsung. Its high-end specifications and unique design could appeal to consumers looking for a stylish and powerful foldable option. However, the higher price point compared to established rivals might prove to be a challenge.

Conclusion

Xiaomi's foray into the foldable phone market with the Mix Flip is a significant move. With its premium specs and competitive features, the Mix Flip aims to carve out a niche in the European market despite its higher price tag. Keep an eye out for its official release in the coming weeks.

wp:postmeta.wp:meta_value: Xiaomi Mix Flip is set to launch in Europe post-August 15th

item.title: BSNL Tower Network: What's new
item.dc:creator: divyanshsharma7117
item.content:encoded:
BSNL Earns Over Rs 1,000 Crore from Tower Leasing in FY24

Bharat Sanchar Nigam Limited (BSNL) continues to bolster its revenue by leasing telecom infrastructure to private operators. In FY24, BSNL earned Rs 1,055.80 crore from this venture, showcasing a significant rise from the Rs 30.73 crore earned in FY11.

Major Lease Contributors

Reliance Jio leads among private operators, leasing 8,408 towers from BSNL. Vodafone Idea (Vi) and Bharti Airtel follow, leasing 1,568 and 2,415 buildings, respectively. This arrangement helps private telecom operators extend their services rapidly and cost-effectively.

BSNL's Tower Network

As of March 31, 2024, BSNL boasts 67,340 mobile towers nationwide. The company has leased 12,502 towers to private telcos, state government entities, and MTNL. This strategic move enhances BSNL's revenue stream while aiding network expansion across India.

Performance and Future Plans

BSNL’s mobile and landline services meet most Quality of Service (QoS) parameters, as reported by the Telecom Regulatory Authority of India (TRAI). With equipment from Tejas Networks, BSNL is upgrading its infrastructure to launch 4G across 1 lakh sites by June 2025, marking a significant leap in service quality and reach.

Conclusion

BSNL's revenue from tower leasing highlights its pivotal role in India's telecom sector. The strategic partnership with private operators not only boosts BSNL's earnings but also accelerates service deployment across the country, benefiting consumers and the telecom industry alike.

wp:postmeta.wp:meta_value: BSNL earned Rs 1,055.80 crore in FY24 from leasing mobile towers to private operators

item.title: Mobile Internet Back Online in Bangladesh After 10 Days
item.dc:creator: divyanshsharma7117
item.content:encoded:
Mobile internet services in Bangladesh resumed on July 28, 2024, following a 10-day suspension. This restoration marks a significant step toward normalcy after the country experienced widespread violence over proposed changes to the government job quota system.

Internet Access Returns

Users of Robi, Grameenphone, Banglalink, and other operators reported regaining internet access around 3 p.m. The restoration came as a relief for many, including businesses and individuals reliant on mobile internet for daily activities. Minister of State for Information and Communication Technology (ICT) Zunaid Ahmed Palak announced that all users would receive 5GB of free internet for three days as a compensatory measure.

Cause of Shutdown

The government initially cut mobile internet on July 18 to prevent the spread of misinformation during the violent protests. These protests were driven by demands to reduce the quota system that reserved 30% of government jobs for relatives of 1971 War of Independence veterans. The violence led to the death of over 100 people, with significant property damage, including a fire at the Department of Disaster Management building, which disrupted broadband services temporarily.

Government's Response

Prime Minister Sheikh Hasina defended the government's harsh measures, including a curfew and shoot-on-sight orders, to restore peace. The apex court has since reduced the veterans' quota to 5%, with 93% of civil service jobs now based on merit and 2% reserved for minorities and disabled individuals.

Social Media Regulation

The Bangladesh Telecommunication Regulatory Commission (BTRC) has summoned representatives from major social media platforms to discuss measures against the spread of fake news. These meetings are scheduled before July 31, and decisions on social media access will follow these discussions.

Path to Normalcy

With mobile internet back online, Dhaka is slowly returning to routine. Traffic is increasing, and banks, garment factories, and other businesses are gradually reopening. The restoration of internet services plays a crucial role in stabilizing the situation and supporting economic activities.

For more updates on Bangladesh's recovery and other news, stay tuned.

Impact on Daily Life

The return of mobile internet connectivity significantly impacts daily life in Bangladesh, affecting everything from communication to business operations.

Government Initiatives

Explore the steps taken by the Bangladeshi government to address the violence and the subsequent restoration of order.

Social Media Challenges

Learn about the challenges of regulating social media to prevent misinformation during crises.

Economic Recovery

Understand the broader economic implications of the internet shutdown and its restoration on Bangladesh's economy.

wp:postmeta.wp:meta_value: Mobile internet restored in Bangladesh after 10 days. Authorities aim to curb fake news amidst anti-quota violence. Free 5GB for users.

item.title: OnePlus Watch 2R Review: Everything you need to know
item.dc:creator: divyanshsharma7117
item.content:encoded:
OnePlus Watch 2R Review: Best Budget Android Smartwatch

The OnePlus Watch 2R emerges as a top choice for budget-conscious Android users, offering powerful performance and comfort without breaking the bank. With a price tag of $229, it stands out among affordable smartwatches.

Powerful Features at a Lower Price

The OnePlus Watch 2R maintains the robust internals of the Watch 2, featuring a 1.43-inch AMOLED display, Snapdragon chip, and multi-day battery life. Despite its lower price, it doesn't skimp on essential features, offering dual-band GPS, fast Snapdragon performance, and impressive workout heart rate accuracy.

Lightweight and Comfortable Design

Transitioning from the steel and sapphire build of the Watch 2 to a lighter aluminum frame, the OnePlus Watch 2R offers a comfortable wear, especially during workouts. Its simple yet functional design appeals to those prioritizing comfort over style.

Improved Fitness Tracking

Addressing previous issues with health tracking, the OnePlus Watch 2R now offers more accurate fitness data, making it a viable option for fitness enthusiasts. Its dual-band GPS and improved heart rate monitoring enhance workout tracking.

Limitations to Consider

While the OnePlus Watch 2R excels in many areas, it does have some drawbacks. It lacks advanced health features like ECG, skin temperature monitoring, and menstrual tracking. Additionally, it doesn't support LTE connectivity and has a basic backup system.

Competitive Pricing and Availability

Launched on July 16, the OnePlus Watch 2R is available for $229 in the U.S. and Canada. It offers excellent value for its price, especially with a 30% discount when purchased with the OnePlus Pad 2.

Conclusion

The OnePlus Watch 2R delivers exceptional value, making it a strong contender in the budget smartwatch market. Its blend of performance, battery life, and comfort positions it as an ideal choice for those seeking a capable and affordable Android smartwatch.

For more in-depth reviews and comparisons, stay tuned to our latest updates.

Design and Build

Explore the lightweight and comfortable design changes from the OnePlus Watch 2 to the 2R.

Performance and Battery Life

Delve into the powerful Snapdragon performance and impressive battery longevity of the OnePlus Watch 2R.

Health and Fitness Tracking

Understand the enhancements in health and fitness tracking accuracy in the OnePlus Watch 2R.

Price and Value

Learn about the competitive pricing and availability of the OnePlus Watch 2R and how it stacks up against other budget smartwatches.

item.title: UAG Compact 3-in-1 Travel Charger: Everything you need to know
item.dc:creator: divyanshsharma7117
item.content:encoded:
Urban Armor Gear (UAG) has introduced a sleek 3-in-1 Travel Charger, perfect for those on the move. This new product headlines UAG’s latest Apple accessory lineup, offering a foldable and MagSafe-compatible solution for charging iPhone, Apple Watch, and AirPods.

Key Features

  • Versatile Charging: The charger supports iPhone, AirPods, and Apple Watch simultaneously.
  • Foldable Design: Ideal for travel, it folds into a compact form.
  • MagSafe Compatibility: Ensures secure and efficient charging.
  • StandBy Mode: Delivers an upright MagSafe-compatible solution, enabling StandBy mode on the go.
  • Included Accessories: Comes with a tech organizer, a 4-foot cable, and a 25W global-ready power adapter.

Pricing and Availability

The 3-in-1 Travel Charger is priced at $169.95 (€159.99 | $199.95 CAN), including essential accessories for a comprehensive charging solution.

Additional UAG Products

Alongside the 3-in-1 Travel Charger, UAG launched:

  • 10K Rugged Power Bank: Priced at $99.95, this durable, water-resistant power bank offers up to 2.5 charges for an iPhone.
  • Wireless Charging Pad + Stand: Available for $59.95, this device provides a functional setup for both viewing and charging.

UAG continues to innovate with products that cater to the needs of modern tech users, ensuring efficient and stylish solutions for everyday charging needs.

wp:postmeta.wp:meta_value: Discover UAG's new 3-in-1 Travel Charger. Compact, foldable, and MagSafe compatible with StandBy mode support. Perfect for iPhone, Apple Watch, and AirPods.

item.title: Vivo V40 Series Launching in India on August 7
item.dc:creator: divyanshsharma7117
item.content:encoded:
Vivo has officially announced the launch of the V40 series in India, scheduled for August 7, 2024, at 12:00 PM IST. The series includes the Vivo V40 and V40 Pro, both boasting impressive features and specifications.

Vivo V40: Key Specifications

  • Display: Curved displays with a hole-punch for the selfie camera.
  • Camera: Zeiss 50 MP Sony IMX921 primary sensor with OIS, Zeiss 50 MP ultrawide camera, and Zeiss 50 MP Sony IMX816 telephoto camera with 2x optical zoom and 50x Zeiss Hyper Zoom. The selfie camera is also a Zeiss 50 MP sensor.
  • Water Resistance: IP68 rating, capable of withstanding depths of up to 1.5 meters for 30 minutes.
  • Battery: 5,500 mAh with 80W fast charging support.
  • Design: The V40 series features a unique camera module with a vertical alignment of sensors and LED flash. The back and front of the smartphones have a curved design.

Color Options

  • Vivo V40: Lotus Purple, Ganges Blue, Titanium Grey.
  • Vivo V40 Pro: Ganges Blue, Titanium Grey.

Expected Pricing

While the official prices will be revealed at the launch, it is expected that the Vivo V40 series will range between Rs 30,000 and Rs 45,000. This estimate is based on the global pricing and the previous models' prices, with the Vivo V30 and V30 Pro launched at Rs 33,999 and Rs 41,999, respectively.

Launch Event Details

The launch event will be streamed live on Flipkart and the Vivo India website, where detailed specifications and pricing will be unveiled. Stay tuned for more updates on the Vivo V40 series, set to redefine smartphone technology with its advanced features and sleek design.

wp:postmeta.wp:meta_value: Vivo V40 series launches in India on August 7, featuring curved displays, Zeiss 50 MP cameras, and IP68 water resistance. Expected price: Rs 30,000 - Rs 45,000.

item.title: Friend AI: Your Tiny AI Friend to Beat Loneliness
item.dc:creator: divyanshsharma7117
item.content:encoded:
US-based Friend.com, led by entrepreneur Avi Schiffman, has introduced a revolutionary AI wearable called Friend. This device, similar in size to an Air Tag, offers companionship and aims to combat loneliness by providing constant interaction with the wearer.

What is Friend AI?

Friend is a pendant-like device that users can wear around their necks. Unlike other AI wearables that focus on productivity, Friend focuses on emotional companionship. It functions as an AI chatbot, sharing opinions and engaging with the user through text messages and push notifications.

Friend AI: Key Features

  • Always Listening: Equipped with a microphone, Friend listens to everything happening around the user by default. Users can also engage directly by tapping and holding the device.
  • Claude 3.5 Large Language Model: Powered by this advanced AI model, Friend offers motivational and encouraging conversations.
  • Battery Life: The device boasts around 15 hours of battery life.
  • Affordability: Priced at $99 with no subscription plan, Friend comes in various colors and is available for pre-order, with shipping starting in January 2025.

CEO’s Vision

Avi Schiffman, a Harvard dropout known for his Covid-19 tracking website, aims to provide a simple AI companion that users can talk to. Friend is not designed to be a therapist but rather a supportive presence.

Conclusion

Friend offers a unique approach to AI wearables by focusing on emotional support and companionship. With its affordable price and innovative features, it is set to make a significant impact in the market. Pre-order your Friend AI wearable today and experience a new level of companionship.

wp:postmeta.wp:meta_value: Discover Friend, a new AI wearable by Avi Schiffman, is designed to offer companionship and combat loneliness. Pre-order now for just $99.

item.title: Samsung to Release One UI 7.0 Beta in August
item.dc:creator: divyanshsharma7117
item.content:encoded:
Samsung is gearing up to roll out the One UI 7.0 beta update based on Android 15 in August. Initially scheduled for July 29th, the release faced delays and is now set for the third week of August. This update promises new features and system improvements for Samsung smartphones, including the flagship Galaxy S24 series in select regions.

Expected Features of Samsung One UI 7.0 Beta

According to SamMobile, the One UI 7.0 beta will introduce several new features and enhancements:

  • Redesigned Quick Panel: The panel will consist of two screens—control buttons and notifications—that users can view by swiping sideways.
  • Hide Guarantee Tag: Users will have the option to hide the guarantee tag for a cleaner interface.
  • Optimized Icons: Standard apps such as Camera, Clock, Contacts, Gallery, and Phone will feature 3D icons aligning with the Material U design language.
  • Battery Level Animation: The battery level indicator will resemble a widget for better visibility.
  • Rounded Notifications: Notifications will have a more rounded appearance for a modern look.
  • Enhanced Continuity Feature: This improvement will allow nearby Samsung devices to seamlessly receive audio and video call notifications.

Availability Update

The One UI 7.0 beta will initially launch for the Samsung Galaxy S24 series, including three models. The beta will be first available in South Korea, with subsequent releases in Germany, India, the UK, and the US. The update might also extend to the Galaxy S23 series.

Samsung’s One UI 7.0 update based on Android 15 is highly anticipated, offering a range of new features and system enhancements designed to improve user experience. Stay tuned for its official release in the coming weeks.

wp:postmeta.wp:meta_value: Samsung's One UI 7.0 beta based on Android 15 is set for an August release. Expected features include a redesigned Quick Panel and optimized icons.

item.title: Telecom Equipment Being Exported to 100+ Counties, Brilliant
item.dc:creator: divyanshsharma7117
item.content:encoded:
New Delhi: India's telecom equipment, designed and manufactured domestically, is now being exported to over 100 countries. Last year, the nation exported telecom equipment and services worth more than $18.2 billion.

"Many of our homegrown telecom companies have made their mark in Western nations, including the US, despite fierce global competition," stated Madhu Arora, Member (Technology), Digital Communications Commission, Department of Telecom.

Achievements in the Telecom Sector

Arora highlighted the Indian Army's recent integration of its first indigenous chip-based 4G mobile base station, developed by local R&D firms. This achievement underscores the country's growing technological prowess.

Addressing the 'Defence Sector ICT Conclave' in the national capital, where 18 companies showcased their products, Arora emphasized that information and communications technology (ICT) forms the backbone of defence operations. "India's vibrant ICT sector, marked by innovation and integrity, has established a significant presence over the past decades. The Indian ICT industry is providing solutions to the world, showcasing India's leadership in this domain," she remarked.

Global Collaboration and Investments

Abhishek Singh, Joint Secretary in the Ministry of External Affairs, noted the ministry's active efforts to enhance cooperation with Africa in the ICT sector. "By focusing on emerging technologies like AI and blockchain, we aim to address specific challenges faced by African countries," Singh said. India has emerged as one of the top five investors in Africa, with cumulative investments of around $75 billion.

Several Indian companies have been instrumental in driving digital transformation across the continent. According to Sandeep Aggarwal, Immediate Past Chairman of the Telecom Equipment & Services Export Promotion Council (TEPC), ICT is critical for maintaining the sovereignty and integrity of India. He added, "India, with its long-standing cooperation and respect for African sovereignty, is a reliable partner in this field."

Conclusion

India's telecom sector continues to thrive, with its products reaching over 100 countries. The nation's commitment to innovation and global cooperation cements its position as a leader in the ICT domain, contributing to both national and international technological advancements.

wp:postmeta.wp:meta_value: India now exports telecom equipment to more than 100 nations, with $18.2 billion worth of exports last year. Discover how India's ICT sector is making global strides.

item.title: Noise ColorFit Ultra 3 Luminary: Everything You need to know
item.dc:creator: divyanshsharma7117
item.content:encoded:
Noise has expanded its wearable lineup with the ColorFit Ultra 3 Luminary launch. This new smartwatch introduces innovative features like Lumialert and Lumiping, enhancing user interaction and notification management.

Key Features

The ColorFit Ultra 3 Luminary sports a 1.96-inch AMOLED display with a resolution of 410x502 pixels. It features a functional rotating crown and a metallic dial, giving it a premium look. Equipped with Bluetooth 5.3, it ensures a stable connection and enhances battery life, promising up to seven days on a single charge.

Lumialert allows users to customize notification alerts for up to five favorite apps, even on the Always-On Display. This feature ensures users never miss an update.

Lumiping enables users to send specific emojis to up to five contacts directly from the smartwatch, adding a personal touch to their interactions.

Health and Productivity

The smartwatch comes with the integrated Noise Health Suite, offering comprehensive wellness monitoring. It tracks heart rate, SpO2 levels, sleep patterns, stress levels, and female cycle tracking. The Productivity Suite includes daily reminders and weather forecasts, helping users stay organized.

Design and Durability

Available in six colors - Jet Black, Forest Green, Space Blue, Olive Green, Vintage Brown, and Silver Grey - the ColorFit Ultra 3 Luminary has an IP68 water and dust resistance rating. Its metallic frame can withstand an active lifestyle.

Sports and Customization

For fitness enthusiasts, the smartwatch offers over 110 sports modes and more than 100 watch faces, allowing extensive customization.

Price and Availability

The Noise ColorFit Ultra 3 Luminary is priced at Rs 2,999. It's available on gonoise.com, Amazon, and Flipkart.

Enhance your wearable experience with the new Noise ColorFit Ultra 3 Luminary, combining style, functionality, and cutting-edge features.

wp:postmeta.wp:meta_value: Discover the new Noise ColorFit Ultra 3 Luminary smartwatch with Lumialert, Lumiping, a 1.96-inch AMOLED display, Bluetooth 5.3, and health tracking. Priced at Rs 2,999

item.title: Bangladesh Shuts Down Mobile Internet, What Happened?
item.dc:creator: divyanshsharma7117
item.content:encoded:
Violent Clashes Lead to Internet Shutdown and Curfew

At least 97 people died, including 14 policemen, and dozens were injured in violent clashes in Bangladesh. The protests called for Prime Minister Sheikh Hasina’s resignation, leading to the government imposing a curfew in Dhaka and shutting down mobile internet services. The unrest is the most significant challenge for Hasina’s government since the deadly protests during her fourth term win in January.

Government Imposes Curfew and Declares Public Holiday

The Home Ministry announced a curfew in Dhaka and other regions from 6 PM on Sunday for an indefinite period. The government also declared a three-day public holiday to ensure public safety.

MEA Issues Travel Advisory

The Ministry of External Affairs (MEA) advised against traveling to Bangladesh, urging Indian nationals to exercise extreme caution and remain in contact with the High Commission of India in Dhaka.

PM Hasina Holds Emergency Meeting

Prime Minister Hasina convened an emergency meeting with the National Committee on Security Affairs. The government ordered the shutdown of social media platforms and 4G mobile services to curb the spread of rumors.

Incidents Across the Country

Protests turned violent in various districts, including Munsiganj, Pabna, and Bogura, leading to additional fatalities and injuries. The violence escalated as demonstrators blocked highways and attacked public properties.

Background of the Protests

The protests, initially sparked by student-led demonstrations against government job quotas, paused after a Supreme Court decision but resumed with renewed demands for justice for those killed in previous clashes. Critics accuse the government of excessive force, a charge it denies.

Emergency Contacts

The MEA provided emergency contact numbers for Indian nationals in Bangladesh: +8801958383679, +8801958383680, +8801937400591.

wp:postmeta.wp:meta_value: Bangladesh imposes curfew and mobile internet shutdown amid violent clashes, resulting in 97 deaths. The government announces a public holiday for safety.

item.title: Cost-Effective Tech for Wearable Devices by INST
item.dc:creator: divyanshsharma7117
item.content:encoded:
Researchers at INST Develop Innovative Wearable Technology

The Institute of Nano Science and Technology (INST) Mohali, an autonomous institute under the Department of Science and Technology, has unveiled a groundbreaking technology for wearable applications. This advancement promises to revolutionize the creation of cost-effective, self-powered wearable devices.

Droplet Microfluidics Technology

The innovative droplet microfluidics technology developed by the INST team produces microspheres with a high electroactive (EA) phase. These microspheres can be used in piezoelectric devices to serve as self-powered sensors, monitoring various physiological signals.

Benefits and Applications

Researchers highlight that integrating this technology into wearable devices opens new avenues for efficient energy harvesting from human motion. This approach paves the way for sustainable and self-sufficient wearable devices, particularly beneficial in the biomedical sector.

Key Advantages

The new method offers several advantages:

  • Simplicity
  • Cost-effectiveness
  • High efficiency
  • Enhanced control

These benefits make it highly significant for applications beyond wearable devices, including self-powered devices and other biomedical applications.

Advanced Manufacturing Technique

The technology combines droplet microfluidics with off-chip thermal polymerization to synthesize tunable Polyvinylidene fluoride (PVDF) microspheres. This technique addresses the limitations of existing methods, which often result in shape irregularities and high energy requirements.

Optimized Microsphere Production

The team achieved uniformity and size control of the microspheres through microfluidic techniques, ranging from 126 to 754 micrometers. Adjusting flow rates and optimizing reaction temperatures enhanced the EA phase to around 82%.

Role of Artificial Intelligence

Artificial Intelligence (AI) was crucial in this research, enabling accurate predictions for microsphere diameter and phases. This significantly reduced the need for extensive laboratory optimization before droplet generation in microfluidics.

Publication and Further Research

The study was recently published in the Chemical Engineering Journal, detailing the extensive characterization and verification of the piezoelectric response of the microspheres. This development marks a significant step forward in wearable technology and its potential applications.

wp:postmeta.wp:meta_value: INST Mohali's new microfluidics tech enables cost-effective, self-powered wearable devices, enhancing energy harvesting and efficiency.

item.title: New Wearable Sensors Harvest Energy from Body Motion
item.dc:creator: divyanshsharma7117
item.content:encoded:
Wearable Sensors Harvesting Body Motion Energy

Chandigarh, August 5 - Scientists have developed innovative technology to create cost-effective and efficient piezoelectric devices for self-powered wearable devices. These devices harvest energy from the human body, monitoring various physiological parameters seamlessly.

Piezoelectric devices work by accumulating an electric charge in specific solid materials, such as crystals, ceramics, and biological matter like bones or proteins, in response to applied mechanical stress.

Researchers at the Institute of Nano-Science and Technology (INST) in Mohali have pioneered a technique within microfluidics to produce microspheres. These tiny solids or hollow spheres made of protein or synthetic polymer exhibit a high electro-active phase, crucial for piezoelectric devices.

Microfluidic Breakthrough

Polymer microspheres offer increased surface area and enhanced interface capabilities. However, traditional production methods face challenges such as shape irregularities and high energy requirements.

Microfluidic techniques overcome these limitations, offering tunability, size and shape control, and efficiency. INST researchers have combined microfluidics with off-chip thermal polymerization techniques to create uniform and monodisperse microspheres. Artificial intelligence (AI) plays a critical role in accurately predicting microsphere diameters and phases, reducing the need for extensive lab optimization before droplet generation in microfluidics.

Applications in Wearable Devices

As a proof of concept, the team explored the application of polyvinylidene fluoride (PVDF) microspheres to develop flexible piezoelectric devices. These devices can seamlessly integrate with various parts of the human body, such as elbows and knees, through wearables. They undergo different degrees of compression based on specific body movements, harnessing otherwise wasted energy. This generated electrical response is substantial, providing enough output voltage to power low-energy devices.

Future Prospects

According to the Ministry of Science and Technology, integrating this technology into wearables opens new avenues for efficient energy harvesting from human motion. This paves the way for sustainable and self-sufficient wearable devices.

The method’s simplicity, cost-effectiveness, high efficiency, and control make it significant for applications in the biomedical sector and beyond. These advancements signal a transformative leap in the development of self-powered devices, potentially revolutionizing how wearables operate and benefit users.

wp:postmeta.wp:meta_value: Scientists develop piezoelectric devices to power Wearable Sensors from human motion, enhancing efficiency and sustainability in healthcare tech.

item.title: GaN Technology By ASUS, everything you need to know
item.dc:creator: divyanshsharma7117
item.content:encoded:
Asus India has introduced its latest innovation, a compact 65W USB-C GaN charger for fast-charging laptops and mobile devices simultaneously. This sleek charger, weighing just 120 grams and 32 x 64.1 x 30 mm, is available at a special launch price of Rs. 2,799, down from its MRP of Rs. 4,999, exclusively on the Asus e-Store.

Dual USB-C Ports and Smart Load Balancing

The charger features dual USB-C ports, allowing users to charge two devices at once. When charging a single device, it delivers up to 65 watts of power. The charger's Smart Load Balancing technology optimizes power distribution between both ports during simultaneous charging, ensuring efficient and reliable performance.

Advanced GaN Technology

Equipped with Gallium Nitride (GaN) technology, the charger supports Power Delivery (PD) and Programmable Power Supply (PPS) protocols. It can charge a phone from 0% to 50% in just 30 minutes, making it ideal for users who need quick power boosts on the go.

Durability and Compatibility

The Asus 65W USB-C GaN Charger comes with a 1.5-meter USB-C-to-USB-C cable that supports a 5-amp current. An integrated E-Marker chip ensures compatibility and fast-charging capabilities across various devices. Asus has subjected the charger to rigorous durability tests, including a 3000-cycle cable bend test and a 10,000-cycle insert-and-removal test, to guarantee longevity and reliability.

This new charger by Asus is poised to become an essential accessory for tech-savvy users looking for efficient and versatile charging solutions.

wp:postmeta.wp:meta_value: Asus launches 65W GaN charger in India, featuring dual USB-C ports, fast charging, and Smart Load Balancing. Available at a special price of Rs. 2,799.

item.title: New Wearable Device Uses Body Heat for Health Monitoring
item.dc:creator: divyanshsharma7117
item.content:encoded:
Overview

Researchers at Georgia Institute of Technology have developed a thermoelectric wearable device that harnesses body heat to power continuous health monitoring, eliminating the need for battery recharging.

Innovative Technology

This flexible, self-powered system generates up to 180 mV from body heat, enabling continuous monitoring of electrophysiological signals. The device operates for up to 7 days without external power, showcasing advanced power management and integration techniques.

Practical Applications

The device can monitor electromyograms and electrocardiograms, aiding in continuous biosignal monitoring, remote health assessment, and automated disease diagnostics. This innovation marks a significant advancement in medical technology, offering a more efficient and user-friendly solution for health monitoring.

wp:postmeta.wp:meta_value: Discover how a new body-heat-powered wearable device enables continuous health monitoring without battery recharging, advancing medical technology.

item.title: Samsung Galaxy Book4 Pro: Powerful and Portable Machine
item.dc:creator: divyanshsharma7117
item.content:encoded:
Overview

The Samsung Galaxy Book4 Pro, part of Samsung's latest laptop lineup, combines powerful performance with a sleek, lightweight design, targeting professionals who need portability and power.

Key Features

  • Display: 14-inch 3K AMOLED, 120Hz refresh rate
  • Processor: Intel Core Ultra 7 155H
  • Memory: Up to 32GB LPDDR5X RAM
  • Storage: Up to 1TB PCIe NVMe M.2
  • Battery: 63Wh, 65W charging

Design and Build

The Galaxy Book4 Pro is crafted from aluminum, featuring a minimalist design. It weighs just 1.24 kg and is under 12mm thick, making it highly portable. The device includes two Thunderbolt 4 ports, HDMI 2.1, USB Type-A, headphone jack, and a microSD card slot.

Display

The 14-inch 3K Dynamic AMOLED touchscreen offers 2880 x 1800 resolution with excellent color reproduction and contrast. It includes an anti-reflective coating and Gorilla Glass DX protection, ensuring durability and usability in various lighting conditions.

Performance

Equipped with the Intel Core Ultra 7 155H processor and Intel Arc graphics, the laptop handles multitasking and less graphics-intensive gaming smoothly. It also features advanced connectivity options with Samsung devices, enhancing productivity.

Battery Life

The 63Wh battery supports up to 8 hours of regular usage. The device’s power-efficient chipset and 65W fast charging ensure you stay productive throughout the day.

Pros and Cons

Pros:

  • Lightweight and portable
  • Powerful performance
  • Excellent display quality

Cons:

  • Premium price
  • Limited gaming capability

Verdict

The Samsung Galaxy Book4 Pro is an excellent choice for professionals seeking a blend of power, portability, and premium design. Despite its high price, the laptop’s robust performance and sleek design make it a worthwhile investment.

wp:postmeta.wp:meta_value: Read our review of the Samsung Galaxy Book4 Pro, a powerful yet sleek laptop with top-notch performance and portability. Ideal for professionals.

item.title: Winbond Unveils 1Gb QspiNAND Flash, Everything you need to know!
item.dc:creator: divyanshsharma7117
item.content:encoded:
Winbond Electronics has unveiled the W25N01KW, a 1Gb 1.8V QspiNAND flash designed to meet the demands of wearable and battery-operated IoT devices.

Innovative Design for Low-Power Applications

The W25N01KW offers low standby power, a compact form factor, and continuous read capabilities for fast boot and instant-on support. This NAND solution achieves high-speed read capabilities up to 52MB/sec in both Continuous Read and Sequential Read modes.

Energy Efficiency and Extended Lifespan

With advanced features like a deep power-down mode that reduces power consumption to as low as 1µA, the W25N01KW enhances energy efficiency and extends device operational lifespan.

Compact and Versatile Packaging

Available in WSON8 (8mm x 6mm) and WSON8 (6mm x 5mm) packages, it ensures ultra-fast code/data access and longer battery life. This compact design contributes to an optimized user experience across various applications.

Commitment to Excellence

“The W25N01KW reflects our commitment to excellence, integrating innovative design elements to transform the landscape of wearable and low-power IoT devices, enabling manufacturers to deliver cutting-edge solutions to consumers,” said Winbond.

Ideal for Multiple Applications

This NAND flash is ideal for energy-efficient devices requiring high performance in a compact design, such as smart cameras, IP cameras, surveillance systems, battery-powered Wi-Fi cameras, and smart doorbells.

wp:postmeta.wp:meta_value: Winbond introduces the 1Gb QspiNAND flash, enhancing wearable and low-power IoT devices with high-speed read capabilities and energy efficiency.

item.title: Xiaomi Launches Black Shark Watch X-H100, What's New?
item.dc:creator: divyanshsharma7117
item.content:encoded:
Xiaomi has introduced the Black Shark Watch X-H100, its latest smartwatch under the Black Shark sub-brand, now available exclusively in China.

Impressive Display and Battery Life

The Watch X-H100 features a 1.9-inch display with 600 nits peak brightness and a 60 Hz refresh rate, providing a clear and vibrant viewing experience. Its 900 mAh battery ensures up to 72 hours of usage between charges, making it ideal for extended use without frequent recharging.

Innovative Built-in Camera

This smartwatch includes a 2 MP camera integrated into its frame, replacing the traditional digital crown. The camera is designed primarily for scanning QR codes, offering convenience without needing to use a paired smartphone.

Cellular Connectivity and Affordable Price

In addition to its camera, the Watch X-H100 supports cellular connectivity, further enhancing its functionality and convenience. Priced at CNY 699 (~$98), it offers significant features at an affordable price, making it a competitive option in the smartwatch market.

Exclusive Availability and Future Prospects

Currently, the Black Shark Watch X-H100 remains exclusive to China, available through JD.com. Its competitive pricing and feature set position it as a strong contender among budget smartwatches.

Expansion of Black Shark Wearables

Xiaomi has been expanding its Black Shark line, including a recent smart ring launch. However, unlike the Black Shark S1 Pro available on Amazon, these wearables are yet to be released outside China.

wp:postmeta.wp:meta_value: Xiaomi's Black Shark Watch X-H100, priced under $100, features a built-in camera, bright display, and a 900 mAh battery for extended use.

item.title: India's Wearable Market Shrinks in 2024, Everything you need to know
item.dc:creator: divyanshsharma7117
item.content:encoded:
According to IDC, India's wearable market faced a significant decline in Q2 2024, with shipments falling by 10% to 29.5 million units. This drop marks the first-ever decrease in this segment, driven by unsold stocks of older models and limited innovation.

Key Players and Market Shares

Despite the market downturn, boAt led the segment with a 26.7% share, followed by Noise at 13%, and Boult at 8.1%. Boult was the only top brand to see growth, with a 9.6% rise in shipments. On the other hand, Oppo, OnePlus, Fire-Boltt, and Noise all experienced double-digit declines.

Smartwatch and Earwear Segments

The smartwatch segment saw a steep 27.4% drop in shipments, with the average selling price (ASP) falling to $20.6 due to inventory clearances. Conversely, the earwear category remained stable, with a slight 0.7% growth, and the Truly Wireless Stereo (TWS) segment reaching a record 71% market share.

Emerging Trends

Notably, the smart ring category continues to grow, with over 72,000 units shipped in Q2 2024, led by Ultrahuman. IDC anticipates more affordable smart rings to enter the market during the upcoming festive season.

This market contraction signals a challenging period for the wearable industry in India, emphasizing the need for innovation and strategic inventory management to drive future growth.

wp:postmeta.wp:meta_value: India's wearable market declined by 10% in Q2 2024, impacted by unsold stocks and low innovation. boAt leads, but smartwatch ASP hits record low

item.title: Xiaomi's Gigantic Battery with super fast 100W charging
item.dc:creator: divyanshsharma7117
item.content:encoded:
Xiaomi is reportedly testing a smartphone with a massive 7,500mAh battery paired with 100W fast charging technology. According to tipster DigitalChatStation, this combination could fully charge the phone in approximately 63 minutes. While this setup is still in the testing phase, it could mark a significant leap in battery technology for Xiaomi phones.

Xiaomi Upcoming Battery and Charging Combinations

Alongside the 7,500mAh battery, Xiaomi is exploring other battery and charging configurations. These include:

  • 5,000mAh with 120W charging: Fully charged in 18 minutes.
  • 6,500mAh with 100W charging: Fully charged in 49 minutes.
  • 7,000mAh with 120W charging: Fully charged in 40 minutes.

Potential Impact on Upcoming Models

The Xiaomi 15 Pro is expected to feature a 6,000mAh battery with either 90W or 100W wired charging. As Xiaomi continues to innovate, these developments could set new standards for smartphone battery life and charging speeds.

This testing aligns with Xiaomi's recent advancements, such as the 300W fast charging in the Redmi Note 12 Discovery Edition, which fully charges a 4,100mAh battery in just 5 minutes. As competition in battery technology heats up, Xiaomi's innovations could offer users faster, longer-lasting power in future devices.

wp:postmeta.wp:meta_value: Xiaomi is reportedly testing a 7,500mAh battery with 100W fast charging, capable of full charge in 63 minutes. Learn more about the upcoming combinations.

item.title: Smart Ring Sales Surge as India's Wearable Market Slips
item.dc:creator: divyanshsharma7117
item.content:encoded:
According to IDC, India's wearable market faced a significant setback in Q2 2024, with shipments falling 10% year-over-year to 29.5 million units. This marks the first major decline in this rapidly evolving sector.

The overall market saw a 4.7% drop in the first half of the year, with 55.1 million units shipped. The average selling price (ASP) of wearables also hit a record low, plummeting by 10.3% from $21 to $18.8 in Q2.

India's Wearable Market Smartwatches Struggle, Earwear Stays Steady

Smartwatches declined steeply, with a 27.4% YoY drop to 9.3 million units. Their share within the wearable market decreased to 31.5% from 39% a year ago.

Conversely, the earwear category remained stable, inching up by 0.7% YoY with 20.1 million units shipped. A new subcategory, OWS/OES (open wireless solution/open ear solution), emerged within this segment, showing the market's adaptability.

Smart Rings: A Beacon of Growth

Despite the overall market downturn, the smart ring category stood out with remarkable growth. Over 72,000 smart rings were shipped in Q2, with an ASP of $204.6. Ultrahuman dominated this niche, capturing a 48.4% market share, followed by Pi Ring at 27.5%, and Aabo at 10.5%.

According to IDC's Vikas Sharma, the market could see a revival in the coming months, as new models from established brands are expected to launch during the festive season. These developments could help mitigate the market's decline and boost consumer interest in wearables once again.

wp:postmeta.wp:meta_value: India's wearable market declines by 10% in Q2 2024, shipping 29.5M units. However, the smart ring category sees impressive growth with over 72,000 units sold.

item.title: TUXEDO launches 3 in 1 laptop, Everything you need to know
item.dc:creator: divyanshsharma7117
item.content:encoded:
TUXEDO Computers has introduced the TUXEDO InfinityFlex 14, their first 3-in-1 convertible Linux laptop. This innovative device is designed for versatility, functioning as a traditional laptop, a tablet, or a space-saving touch display.

The InfinityFlex 14 features a 14-inch bright, matte-coated, Full HD touchscreen with a 16:10 aspect ratio and 400 nits brightness. It also supports pressure-sensitive pen input, making it ideal for creative professionals and on-the-go users. The lightweight, partially aluminum chassis weighs just 1.5 kg, offering portability without compromising build quality.

Powered by an Intel Core i5-1335U processor with 10 cores, the InfinityFlex 14 promises strong performance. It also includes up to 64 GB of upgradable DDR4-3200 RAM and a 55 Wh battery, capable of delivering up to six hours of video playback.

For connectivity, the laptop supports 4G LTE, Bluetooth 5.3, two USB-C ports, HDMI 2.0, USB Type-A ports, and a microSD/SIM card reader. It also comes with TUXEDO OS pre-installed, featuring the KDE Plasma desktop environment, with options for Ubuntu or Kubuntu.
