Although AI-powered tools like writing assistants, Image Playground, and a smarter Siri are highlights, they will only be available on iPhone 15 Pro models and the iPhone 16 series. These AI tools will not launch immediately but will arrive with the iOS 18.1 update next month.

Device Compatibility

Apple has confirmed that iOS 18 will be available on various devices, including the iPhone XR and iPhone SE (2022), ensuring many older models receive the update. However, some features will remain exclusive to newer models.

Additional Updates

Besides AI enhancements, iOS 18 brings customizable control center options, replaceable lock screen icons, and improvements to the Photos app. Apple also introduces a long-awaited call recording feature on iPhone.

With the final version arriving soon, users can expect a range of new features and improvements designed to elevate the iPhone experience.

wp:postmeta.wp:meta_value: Apple releases the iOS 18 Release Candidate update with new features, AI tools, and screen customization options. Official launch set for September 16.

item.title: Apple Watch Series 10: Thinner, Smarter, and Sleeker
item.dc:creator: divyanshsharma7117
item.content:encoded:
Today, Apple launched the game-changing Apple Watch Series 10; today, the latest model boasts of Apple's thinnest design ever that hosts the largest and most advanced display ever. The Series 10 introduces innovative features like sleep apnea notifications, faster charging, and water depth and temperature sensing-features which will make it a great buddy for health-conscious persons.

Refined, Thinner Design
The Apple Watch Series 10 is about 10% thinner than the older series. It also has an ultra-new metal back that smoothes the antenna into one mute piece. This watch is made out of aluminum and titanium, making it lighter and even more comfortable.

Larger, Higher-tech Display
Series 10 offers screen areas of up to 30% more than their predecessors for better readability and interactions with apps. The devices touts Apple's first wide-angle OLED display, thus offering as much as 40% more brightness when viewed at an angle.

Health and Safety Innovations
New notifications for sleep apnea now leverage advanced algorithms to detect breathing disturbances and arm users with valuable information that could lead to the early diagnosis of this condition. The watch also retains its essential safety features, including Crash Detection and Fall Detection.

Water depth and temperature sensing
The Apple Watch Series 10 includes a number of upgrades for water sports enthusiasts: a depth gauge, water temperature sensor, and the new Tides app, which displays forecasted tidal information.

Faster Charging
Having the highest charging capacity today, it offers users 8 hours of normal use with just 15 minutes of charging. Ideal for both daytime and nighttime use, it charges to 80% in just 30 minutes. Pre-orders are available now, ahead of its official release on September 20.

wp:postmeta.wp:meta_value: Apple introduces the Watch Series 10 with its thinnest design, advanced display, sleep apnea notifications, faster charging, and water depth and temperature sensing.

item.title: Google is introducing a powerful new feature: desktop windowing
item.dc:creator: divyanshsharma7117
item.content:encoded:
Google is enhancing its tablet experience with Android 15 QPR 1 Beta 2, introducing a powerful new feature: desktop windowing. This feature, currently available as a developer option, brings a desktop-like experience to the Pixel Tablet, allowing users to run multiple apps simultaneously, resize app windows, and interact with the device in ways traditionally associated with desktop computers.

While still in the testing phase, desktop windowing is expected to roll out more broadly with future Android releases, positioning Android tablets as serious multitasking devices for both work and entertainment.

Google, What is Desktop Windowing?

Desktop windowing allows Android tablets to support multiple apps running in resizable windows, similar to a desktop computer’s functionality. Users can open, move, and resize windows with ease, providing a more flexible and powerful interface for multitasking.

By enabling this feature, the Pixel Tablet transforms into a versatile workspace. Apps open in full-screen mode by default, but you can easily switch them to windowed mode, letting you interact with several apps at once. For example, you can browse the web, take notes, and chat simultaneously, making it ideal for productivity.

How to Enable Desktop Windowing on Pixel Tablet

To try desktop windowing on your Pixel Tablet running Android 15 QPR 1 Beta 2, follow these steps:

  1. Go to Settings.
  2. Scroll to Developer Options (ensure Developer Mode is enabled).
  3. Select Enable Freeform Windows.

Once enabled, you can start using desktop windowing by pressing and holding the window handle in the status bar and dragging the app to a different location. From there, you can open multiple windows and arrange them as needed.

Alternatively, you can use keyboard shortcuts for quick actions:

  • Windows/Command/Search + Ctrl + Down to activate desktop windowing.
  • Windows/Command/Search + H to return apps to full screen.

Taskbar and Window Controls

The taskbar, fixed at the bottom of the screen, plays a central role in the desktop windowing experience. It shows running apps, giving users quick access to switch between open windows. Users can also pin their favorite apps for easy access. A new header bar at the top of each window includes controls to minimize, maximize, or close the window.

This user interface mirrors traditional desktop environments like Samsung Dex, but it's now deeply integrated within Android, marking a significant improvement in Android tablet multitasking.

Developer Considerations

Google is advising developers to prepare their apps for this new user experience by adopting adaptive layouts. Apps should be able to resize seamlessly and support multitasking features such as drag-and-drop for sharing content between apps. Developers should also consider enabling their apps to support multiple instances—especially important for productivity tools and browsers.

With desktop windowing becoming more prevalent in the Android ecosystem, developers need to ensure their apps offer a smooth experience across various window sizes and multitasking environments. Google’s blog post recommends best practices for developers to enhance compatibility with this feature.

A Preview of Android's Future

Although desktop windowing is currently limited to the Pixel Tablet through a developer setting, it’s expected to expand across more devices with future updates, likely becoming a standard feature in Android 16. By making tablets more productive, Google aims to compete with existing solutions like iPadOS and Samsung Dex. This move signals Android’s push to offer a full-fledged, flexible workspace for users who want more out of their tablets.

Why This Matters for Android Tablet Users

For those who rely on their tablets for work, desktop windowing brings a significant shift in how Android tablets are used. It transforms the Pixel Tablet into a desktop-like environment, making it easier to handle tasks that require multiple apps at once, such as document editing, browsing, or content creation.

As this feature matures, it will likely become one of the biggest selling points for Android tablets, positioning them as viable alternatives to laptops for many users. Whether you're a developer preparing apps for this new interface or an Android enthusiast, desktop windowing is an exciting step forward for Android tablets.

wp:postmeta.wp:meta_value: Google Android 15 QPR 1 Beta adds desktop windowing to Pixel Tablet, enabling multitasking with resizable app windows for a desktop-like experience.

item.title: Manipur Extends Internet Ban, Why are they doing it?
item.dc:creator: divyanshsharma7117
item.content:encoded:
Manipur Extends Internet Ban and Curfew Amid Protests

The Manipur government has extended the mobile internet ban in five districts until September 20, 2024. This decision comes in response to the ongoing law and order challenges in the region, triggered by widespread protests. The affected districts include Imphal West, Imphal East, Thoubal, Bishnupur, and Kakching.

The ban, initially imposed to prevent the spread of misinformation, now remains in place due to concerns that online disinformation could fuel more unrest. Mobile data, VPN services, and VSATs are all restricted. However, the government has conditionally lifted the suspension for broadband services (ILL and FTTH), allowing limited access under strict terms.

Curfew Relaxation and Impact

Manipur authorities imposed a curfew across valley districts starting on September 10, 2024. While curfews are in place, a brief relaxation period from 5 AM to 12 noon allows residents to buy essential goods, including food and medicine.

During the relaxed hours, long queues formed in markets and ATM booths as residents scrambled to withdraw cash. Many residents have been struggling with online transactions due to the internet restrictions, adding to the urgency.

Despite the relaxation, essential services personnel are exempted from the curfew restrictions.

Protests and Ongoing Violence

Manipur has been dealing with violence since May 2023, following a rally that escalated into conflict. The unrest has claimed over 200 lives and displaced more than 50,000 people, many of whom are in relief camps. Protests over the government's response to the violence, including recent student-led demonstrations, have added to the tension.

In Delhi, the Delhi Meetei Coordinating Committee recently held protests at Jantar Mantar to draw attention to the ongoing situation in Manipur.

Looking Ahead

The government continues to monitor the situation closely. If tensions persist, further curfew extensions and internet restrictions may follow to prevent escalation.

wp:postmeta.wp:meta_value: Manipur extends mobile internet ban in 5 districts till Sept 20 due to ongoing unrest. Curfew relaxed for essential needs as protests continue.

item.title: 3D Printed Wearable Market to Grow by $6.74 Billion by 2031
item.dc:creator: divyanshsharma7117
item.content:encoded:
3D Printed Wearable Market Growth: Trends, Key Players, and Opportunities

The global 3D printed wearable market is projected to grow from $3.88 billion in 2024 to $6.74 billion by 2031, at a CAGR of 8.2%. Key players like Adidas, Nike, Apple, and Google (Fitbit) are driving this growth through innovations in personalized products and advanced technologies like Futurecraft 4D and Flyprint.

Market Trends

Customization remains a major growth driver, with consumers demanding personalized wearable products. Technological advancements in 3D printing, such as improved durability and lighter materials, are also contributing to market expansion. The healthcare and sports sectors present significant growth opportunities.

Key Players

Major industry players include Adidas, Nike, Under Armour, Apple, Google (Fitbit), and Carbon, Inc. These companies are pushing the boundaries of wearable technology with new 3D printed products, enhancing user experience through bespoke designs.

Market Restraints and Opportunities

While material limitations and production costs pose challenges, opportunities lie in healthcare applications and the sports and luxury sectors. Expanding adoption in fitness and fashion markets will further fuel growth.

wp:postmeta.wp:meta_value: The 3D printed wearable market is set to reach $6.74 billion by 2031, driven by customization, rising adoption of wearables, and tech innovations.

item.title: Solana Mobile has just released its latest Web3 phone, dubbed Seeker
item.dc:creator: divyanshsharma7117
item.content:encoded:
Solana Mobile has just released its latest Web3 phone, dubbed Seeker. The successor to the eagerly awaited Solana Saga is loaded with a plethora of features that have the potential to enhance the user experience further.

What's better is that, in terms of better features, it looks like Solana Mobile has done it again with this latest drop.
It comes with a 6.36-inch display and 128GB storage, and 8GB of RAM. The phone promises to offer better battery life and two upgraded cameras for perfect photography.

Built for Web3
Designed with Web3 in mind, the Seeker includes a seed vault wallet in collaboration with Solflare for more secure management of one's digital assets. The mobile app store has also been improved to provide an even smoother experience in accessing decentralized applications or dApps for users.
AI and Exclusive Web3 Content
The Seeker also introduces AI features and provides exclusive rewards to Web3 gamers, creating a deeper bond between them and the overall Solana ecosystem.

Genesis Token and Community Rewards
The Seeker also comes with a Genesis token that allows people to claim rewards from creators who wish to reach out to the Solana community. The preorder for the Seeker is already open.

Conclusion
With the Seeker, Solana Mobile is changing the game of the Web3 arena by coming up with a smartphone catering to crypto maniacs, web3 gamers, and creators.

wp:postmeta.wp:meta_value: Solana Mobile launches Seeker, its next Web3-focused phone with AI elements, 128GB storage, 6.36" display, and enhanced seed vault wallet. Preorders open now.

item.title: NTR Cybercrime Police Recover 400 Mobile Phones Worth ₹50 Lakh
item.dc:creator: divyanshsharma7117
item.content:encoded:
The NTR Commissionerate's cybercrime police successfully tracked 400 mobile phones valued at ₹50 lakh. These phones were returned to their rightful owners during a program on Sunday, led by Police Commissioner S.V. Rajasekhar Babu.

Mobile Phone Recovery Drive

This recovery is part of an ongoing effort where the cybercrime unit has retrieved 1,785 lost and missing mobile phones across three phases. The police rely on IMEI numbers provided by victims to file complaints with the Central Equipment Identity Register (CEIR), helping them trace phones through telecom service providers.

Importance of Mobile Data Security

Commissioner Rajasekhar Babu highlighted the growing importance of mobile phone security, noting that devices today hold sensitive information, including bank details and personal data. This has made mobile recovery a priority for law enforcement.

Success Stories

Among the recipients was 80-year-old Guthikonda Anjaneyulu, who was delighted to retrieve his lost phone. Anjaneyulu, who lost his phone at Pandit Nehru Bus Station, urged others to report missing phones immediately.

Deputy Commissioner of Police Gowtami Sali, CCS Raja Rao, and Additional DCP G. Ramakrishna were present at the event. The police emphasized their use of advanced technology to ensure a higher recovery rate for missing phones.

wp:postmeta.wp:meta_value: NTR cybercrime police recover 400 mobile phones worth ₹50 lakh. Over 1,785 devices were traced in a phased drive to return lost phones to owners.

item.title: Revolutionary Wearable Artificial Intelligence gadget promises to give users an "Infinite Memory of Life."
item.dc:creator: divyanshsharma7117
item.content:encoded:
San Francisco-based tech entrepreneur Advait Paliwal, of Indian descent, has unveiled Iris. This revolutionary wearable artificial intelligence gadget promises to give users an "infinite memory of life." By taking a photo every minute, the gadget builds a personalized timeline that makes it simple to recollect past events. Users can keep these moments on the gadget or the cloud.

Characteristics of Iris
Iris is more than simply a picture storage app; it has a ton of cutting-edge features that improve productivity and memory.

  • Timeline View: Assists with activity tracking by providing a visual record of your life's events.
  • Focus Mode: Assists users in completing tasks by identifying distractions and gently nudging them to stay focused.

This gadget with AI capabilities can sharpen attention considerably. For example, Iris will remind you to refocus during a predetermined 30-minute reading time.

Design and Inspiration
Iris's design is influenced by the evil eye, a symbol that is said to ward off ill luck. Paliwal elucidated his desire for a clean, contemporary look, utilizing the evil eye's circular form as the camera's foundation.

Diverse Responses on the Internet
Although the novel idea was well received, several users expressed worries about social interaction and privacy. Despite its fundamental AI design, Iris is viewed by many as a game-changer in the wearable technology industry.

The gadget differs from its unsuccessful predecessors, such as Google Clip and Memento, in that it can caption, organize, and retrieve life's moments.

wp:postmeta.wp:meta_value: Advait Paliwal introduces Iris, a wearable AI device that captures life’s moments, offering "infinite memory" and enhancing focus with AI reminders.

item.title: Meta CEO Mark presented latest wearable innovations
item.dc:creator: divyanshsharma7117
item.content:encoded:
Meta CEO Mark Zuckerberg presented Meta's latest wearable tech innovations during the Meta Connect 2024 conference. His keynote unveiled the highly anticipated Orion AR glasses, designed to transform user interaction with digital content. Lightweight and resembling regular glasses, Orion allows users to integrate AR visuals into their physical environment seamlessly.

Zuckerberg highlighted Orion’s advanced features, including voice controls, hand tracking, and a discreet interface. Equipped with custom silicon chips and an EMG wristband for seamless input, Orion is set to redefine how users interact socially and professionally.

Additionally, Meta announced the launch of the Meta Quest 3S, a powerful, yet affordable VR headset. Priced at $299 and releasing on Oct. 15, it offers mixed reality experiences with improved resolution and graphics. This positions Meta at the forefront of wearable tech in the connected economy.

Orion AR Glasses: A Leap Forward

Meta's Orion glasses represent a decade of research and development. Unlike current AR models, Orion offers true digital integration with the physical world, going beyond passthrough tech.

Meta Quest 3S: Affordable VR for All

The Quest 3S, designed for gamers and VR enthusiasts, includes enhanced processing capabilities, higher resolution, and improved graphics.

With these innovations, Meta aims to solidify its role in shaping the future of wearable technology.

wp:postmeta.wp:meta_value: Mark Zuckerberg reveals Meta’s Orion AR glasses and Quest 3S headset at Meta Connect 2024, showcasing wearable tech innovations for the connected economy.

item.title: Alienware m16 R2 Review: A Powerful Gaming Laptop for Everyday Use
item.dc:creator: divyanshsharma7117
item.content:encoded:
Alienware m16 R2 Review: A Versatile Gaming Laptop for Everyday Tasks

Dell’s Alienware m16 R2 gaming laptop, starting at Rs 1,49,999, offers a compact design and high-performance hardware like the Intel Core Ultra 9 processor and NVIDIA GeForce RTX 4070 GPU. Let’s dive into how this gaming powerhouse balances performance with everyday usability.

Design and Build

The Alienware m16 R2 features a sleeker design, with a 15% reduction in size thanks to the removal of the thermal shelf. Its anodized grey metal lid sports the iconic Alienware logo, with hexagonal vents for better airflow. Weighing 2.6kg, the laptop still maintains portability.

Display

The laptop boasts a 16-inch QHD+ display with a 240Hz refresh rate and support for G-Sync, FreeSync, and Dolby Vision HDR. Despite the impressive gaming specs, the 300-nit IPS panel may fall short in bright environments. Color accuracy could be improved, but it’s sufficient for gaming.

Performance

Equipped with an Intel Core Ultra 9 processor, RTX 4070 graphics card, 32GB RAM, and 1TB storage, the m16 R2 delivers exceptional gaming and multitasking performance. It handled games like Starfield and Forza Horizon 5 at 90 FPS with ease. However, the laptop tends to heat up during extended sessions.

Everyday Usability

One standout feature is Stealth Mode, which disables lighting for discreet use in professional settings. This, combined with its powerful specs, makes the m16 R2 suitable for productivity tasks like video editing, giving it versatility beyond gaming.

Battery Life

The 90Wh battery provides about 1 hour of gaming or 3 hours in productivity mode. Fast charging compensates for the average battery life, charging 60% in 30 minutes.

Verdict

The Alienware m16 R2 balances gaming power with everyday functionality, making it a versatile option for users seeking more than just a gaming machine. However, expect some trade-offs in display quality and battery life.

wp:postmeta.wp:meta_value: The Alienware m16 R2 combines high-end gaming performance with everyday usability. Discover if this Rs 1,49,999 laptop meets your needs in our detailed review.

item.title: Nothing Phone 3 Teased in Video: Hole-Punch Display Confirmed
item.dc:creator: divyanshsharma7117
item.content:encoded:
The UK-based tech brand Nothing, founded by OnePlus co-founder Carl Pei, has dropped a major hint about its upcoming Nothing Phone 3. In a recent video for the launch of the Ear Open headphones, viewers got a sneak peek of the anticipated phone, confirming its existence and giving us a glimpse of its design.

Phone 3 Design Teased

The Nothing Phone 3 is shown briefly in the video, featuring a hole-punch display with symmetrical bezels. Volume buttons are placed on the left side, while the power button is on the right, suggesting an upgraded design over the Nothing Phone 2, which launched in July 2022.

Expected Specifications

Rumors suggest the Phone 3 will be powered by Snapdragon 8s Gen 3 SoC and will likely retain the signature transparent back and Glyph LED interface. While the phone is expected to launch in 2025, excitement is already building following this teaser.

Stay tuned for more updates as Nothing gears up for the official unveiling of Phone 3!

wp:postmeta.wp:meta_value: Nothing Phone 3 teased in an official video with a hole-punch display and Snapdragon 8s Gen 3 SoC. Expected to debut in 2025 as a successor to the Phone 2.

item.title: Meta newest VR headset is set to launch on October 15
item.dc:creator: divyanshsharma7117
item.content:encoded:
Meta newest VR headset, the Meta Quest 3S, is set to launch on October 15 with a price tag of just $300. Despite being $200 cheaper than the Meta Quest 3, the Quest 3S offers nearly all the same features. It includes Qualcomm's Snapdragon XR2 Gen 2 platform and full-color passthrough vision for a seamless mixed-reality experience.

The new headset also features Meta’s Horizon OS, allowing users to switch between apps, games, and immersive experiences with ease. With 128GB of storage in the base model (expandable to 256GB for $100 more), the Quest 3S is designed for accessibility, offering a lower buy-in to virtual reality.

Meta has significantly reduced the price of its high-end models, with the Quest 3 now available at $500 for the 512GB version. Meanwhile, production on older models like the Quest 2 and Quest Pro will soon be halted.

Meta’s push towards affordable VR aligns with lessons learned from Apple’s Vision Pro, as Meta aims to cater to the wider, more price-conscious consumer base.

The headset is available for preorder and includes a pre-installed Batman: Arkham Shadow game for early buyers, offering a thrilling introduction to VR gaming.

This release marks Meta’s continued commitment to making VR more accessible and affordable, signaling its shift in focus towards wider adoption of mixed reality.

wp:postmeta.wp:meta_value: Meta Quest 3S headset offers near-identical features to the Quest 3 but at $200 less, making it a more affordable gateway into VR.

item.title: Long Covid Patients "Hack" Fitness Trackers to Manage Symptoms
item.dc:creator: divyanshsharma7117
item.content:encoded:
Long Covid patients have turned to fitness trackers to manage their symptoms, using the devices in ways that go beyond their original purpose. Rather than tracking fitness goals, they use the data to limit strenuous activities and conserve energy.

Self-Monitoring: A Double-Edged Sword

Assistant professor Sarah Homewood, who has researched this phenomenon, reveals that self-monitoring offers both benefits and challenges. On the one hand, it provides users with more control and certainty over their condition. However, the constant data tracking can also trigger anxiety.

Homewood's studies, published in prominent computing conferences, found that fitness tracker users often feel empowered by their ability to track symptoms, but they also experience uneasiness when data contradicts how they feel. In one case, a participant stopped an enjoyable relaxation activity after receiving concerning stress-level data from her device.

Using Data for Better or Worse

For many, fitness trackers become a tool to manage their day-to-day lives with long Covid. Patients check heart rates to avoid overexertion or decide on daily activities based on the steps tracked. Yet, Homewood warns that the data from fitness trackers isn’t always medically accurate, which can mislead users.

Some doctors reject fitness data outright, while others use it to help diagnose or track symptoms. The watches, though designed for fitness, can still reveal trends over time that one-off doctor visits may miss.

The Future of Wearable Technology in Healthcare

As wearable tech advances, Homewood believes there is potential for fitness trackers to bridge the gap between self-monitoring patients and their doctors. She’s collaborating with tech companies to improve software tailored for illness, rather than fitness, and develop dashboards that help healthcare professionals interpret the data.

The key takeaway: Fitness trackers can be helpful for those with long Covid, but their limitations need to be understood to prevent undue anxiety.

By optimizing wearable tech for long-term illness, patients and doctors can better collaborate, empowering users without causing harm.

wp:postmeta.wp:meta_value: Long Covid patients use fitness trackers to manage symptoms, gaining control but sometimes triggering anxiety. Learn how data helps—and harms—their recovery journey.

item.title: Mobile Retailers Call for Licence Cancellations of Chinese Smartphone Brands
item.dc:creator: divyanshsharma7117
item.content:encoded:
The All India Mobile Retailers Association (AMIRA) has urged the Indian government to cancel the operating licenses of several Chinese smartphone brands, including iQoo, Poco, and OnePlus. The association claims these brands rely heavily on online sales channels, excluding local retailers and harming their businesses.

Concerns Over E-commerce Exclusivity

AMIRA’s letter to Commerce Minister Piyush Goyal and Finance Minister Nirmala Sitharaman outlines the detrimental effects of e-commerce exclusivity on the retail market. These brands, according to the association, limit product availability in traditional stores, favoring platforms like Amazon and Flipkart.

Kailash Lakhyani, Chairman of AMIRA, emphasized that this practice is marginalizing local retailers and raising compliance concerns. The association also criticized these brands for supporting grey market activities, further eroding fair trade.

Economic Impact on Local Traders

In addition to anti-competitive practices, AMIRA highlighted economic concerns. It mentioned that many Chinese smartphone brands retain earnings in Complete Knocked Down (CKD) formats, contributing little to the Indian exchequer. The letter expressed that limiting product access to local traders hampers their economic contributions, while customers lose bargaining power, reducing market competition.

Call for Fair Competition

AMIRA’s plea to the Indian government underscores the urgent need to protect local mobile retailers. With over 1.5 million members, the association seeks the cancellation of licenses for brands that disregard local business interests, ensuring a fairer trading environment in the mobile retail sector.

wp:postmeta.wp:meta_value: AMIRA urges the Indian government to revoke Chinese smartphone brands' licenses, citing anti-competitive practices harming local retailers.

item.title: BSNL Partners with Karbonn for Affordable 4G Phones
item.dc:creator: divyanshsharma7117
item.content:encoded:
BSNL is stepping up its game with a significant new partnership. On its Foundation Day, the state-owned telecom giant signed an MoU with Karbonn Mobiles to launch affordable 4G phones, undercutting Jio’s pricing strategy.

Affordable 4G Solutions for Rural India

With rising tariffs from competitors like Jio, Airtel, and Vodafone, many customers have turned to BSNL for more affordable options. The new 4G phone from Karbonn will come bundled with a BSNL SIM, offering high-speed internet connectivity at a price that beats Jio’s.

This collaboration focuses on India’s 4G Saathi initiative, targeting rural and budget-conscious users. These new devices will also be compatible with older phone models, ensuring broader access to 4G connectivity.

AI-Powered Spam Prevention Coming Soon

BSNL isn’t stopping with just hardware. The company has also announced the development of an AI/ML-powered solution to combat spam communication on its network. The system will detect and neutralize spam messages before they reach customers, enhancing user experience.

The telecom company will showcase this technology at the India Mobile Congress 2024, taking place from October 15-18.

Conclusion

With these moves, BSNL is positioning itself as a strong competitor in India’s telecom market, especially in rural areas, by offering affordable services and cutting-edge technology.

wp:postmeta.wp:meta_value: BSNL partners with Karbonn to launch 4G phones cheaper than Jio, expanding rural connectivity. New AI solution to combat spam also announced.

item.title: HiBox Scam: 30,000 People Duped, Influencers Under Investigation
item.dc:creator: divyanshsharma7117
item.content:encoded:
In a massive fraud case linked to the HiBox mobile app, over 30,000 people were scammed out of their investments. Promised daily returns of 1-5%, victims were lured into investing after promotional endorsements from popular social media influencers and celebrities. The scam, which began in February 2024, has now escalated into a ₹500 crore case under police scrutiny.

Prominent Influencers Under Investigation

Celebrities like actor Rhea Chakraborty, comedian Bharti Singh, and YouTuber Elvish Yadav are currently being questioned. These personalities, along with other influencers, allegedly promoted the HiBox app, encouraging their followers to invest in the fraudulent scheme.

The investigation began after Delhi Police received over 500 complaints, with victims claiming they invested based on influencers' promotional videos. The app paid promised returns until June, after which it began withholding payments, citing technical and legal issues.

How the HiBox Scam Worked

The app, launched in February 2024, convinced investors with guarantees of up to 90% monthly returns. However, by mid-2024, payments stopped, and the company cited various reasons like technical glitches, GST issues, and legal problems. Sivaram, the main accused and a resident of Chennai, has been arrested.

Payment Platforms Under Scrutiny

In addition to the influencers, police are also investigating payment platforms like Easebuzz and PhonePe. Authorities claim these platforms failed to follow RBI guidelines in facilitating the transactions. Easebuzz has stated that it blocked the HiBox merchant in July 2024 and filed a Suspicious Transaction Report (STR) with the Financial Intelligence Unit (FIU).

The investigation continues, with more influencers and financial institutions being probed.

wp:postmeta.wp:meta_value: The HiBox app scam, which duped over 30,000 people, has triggered an investigation involving actors and influencers. The fraud amounts to ₹500 crore.

item.title: Oura Ring 4 Launched with Titanium Build, Enhanced Health Tracking
item.dc:creator: divyanshsharma7117
item.content:encoded:
The Oura Ring 4 has officially launched, offering a sleek titanium design and advanced health-tracking features. This smart ring, now available for pre-order in select global markets, promises a refined user experience through improved activity monitoring and comprehensive wellness insights.

Pricing and Availability

Priced at $349 (approximately £290), the Oura Ring 4 comes in six stylish color options: Black, Brushed Silver, Gold, Rose Gold, Silver, and Stealth. It caters to a wide audience with sizes ranging from 4 to 15. Pre-orders are open in the US, UK, and select European countries, with shipping starting on October 15.

Key Features and Specifications

Crafted from lightweight titanium, the Oura Ring 4 is designed for durability and comfort. It boasts a water resistance rating of up to 100 meters, making it suitable for various environments. Oura’s Smart Sensing technology utilizes red and infrared LEDs to monitor blood oxygen levels during sleep, while green and infrared LEDs measure heart rate, heart rate variability, and respiration rate. The ring also includes an accelerometer for daily activity tracking and a digital sensor to measure body temperature fluctuations.

Enhanced App Experience

The updated Oura App provides deeper insights into stress, activity, and reproductive health, enhancing the user experience. The Oura Labs platform also allows users to test experimental features on iOS and Android devices.

The Oura Ring 4 delivers an impressive battery life of up to eight days on a single charge, with a fast charging time of 20 to 80 minutes. Each ring comes with a size-specific charger and USB Type-C cable for convenience.

wp:postmeta.wp:meta_value: The Oura Ring 4 debuts with a sleek titanium design, improved health tracking, and a price starting at $349. Available for pre-order in the US, UK, and Europe.

item.title: Snap and Meta Introduce Revolutionary AR Glasses
item.dc:creator: divyanshsharma7117
item.content:encoded:
Tech giants Snap and Meta are ushering in a new era of wearable tech by unveiling their latest augmented reality (AR) glasses. These innovations hint at a future where AR technology could replace smartphones.

In September, Snap announced its fifth-generation Spectacles. These glasses can overlay digital content onto the real world, but for now, are available only to developers for $99 a month. The goal? To encourage the development of apps tailored for this AR hardware.

Later in the month, Meta’s CEO Mark Zuckerberg introduced the company’s new AR prototype, Orion, at their annual conference. These lightweight glasses, equipped with AI, can analyze user behavior and offer proactive suggestions. The glasses can be controlled with hand and brain signals via specialized wristbands.

AR and VR on the Rise

PwC says the global AR and VR market will see explosive growth between 2019 and 2030. As more companies invest in AR technology, its potential impact on daily life grows significantly.

Focus on AR Glasses Technology

Both Snap and Meta aim to revolutionize how we interact with the world, blending 2D and 3D digital content seamlessly with reality. This step forward could signal the decline of the smartphone era, paving the way for immersive AR experiences.

Snap’s Spectacles and Meta’s Orion could become the foundation for a new class of wearable technology that changes the way we engage with digital content.

wp:postmeta.wp:meta_value: Meta and Snap reveal new AR glasses, signaling a shift in wearable tech that aims to replace smartphones. Explore the latest in augmented reality advancements.

item.title: Tivoli Audio Revive Review: A Multifunctional Gadget for Your Desk
item.dc:creator: divyanshsharma7117
item.content:encoded:
The Tivoli Audio Revive is a multifunctional gadget combining a Bluetooth speaker, wireless charger, and lamp into one stylish unit. It’s designed to declutter your workspace, blending elegance and practicality. But does its price tag of ₹21,990 match the value it offers?

Unboxing and Design

Tivoli delivers a premium unboxing experience, with the device snugly packed alongside a power adapter and user manual. The Revive’s design is modern and elegant, featuring real wood. Its compact form fits seamlessly on a desk or nightstand.

The speaker, housed in a wooden cube, pivots to adjust the sound direction slightly. However, the lamp control button placement beside the wireless charger proves inconvenient, as it’s easy to accidentally turn on the lamp while placing your phone to charge. Moving the touch button to the lamp itself would improve usability.

Wireless Charging: Slow but Steady

The wireless charger supports Qi charging but maxes out at 5W, meaning it takes 3-4 hours to fully charge a smartphone with a 4000mAh battery. Unfortunately, the slow charging speed is a major drawback, especially for those expecting faster charging.

Bluetooth Speaker: Good for Casual Listening

The Bluetooth speaker offers decent sound quality with a premium fabric mesh covering. While not built for high-volume listening, it works well for casual music sessions or background audio. The pivoting speaker design helps direct sound, but the limited 15-degree angle restricts flexibility.

Final Verdict: Is It Worth It?

At ₹21,990, the Tivoli Audio Revive brings sleek aesthetics and multifunctionality. However, its slow wireless charging and modest speaker performance may not justify the price for all users. If design and functionality in one unit matter most, it’s worth considering.

Pros:

  • Elegant, space-saving design
  • Multi-functionality: speaker, lamp, wireless charger
  • Real wood finish

Cons:

  • Slow 5W wireless charging
  • Lamp touch control placement is awkward

wp:postmeta.wp:meta_value: The Tivoli Audio Revive combines a Bluetooth speaker, wireless charger, and lamp. Read our review to see if it's worth its ₹21,990 price tag.

item.title: Sennheiser ACCENTUM Wireless SE and BTD 600 Launched in India
item.dc:creator: divyanshsharma7117
item.content:encoded:
Sennheiser has unveiled the ACCENTUM Wireless SE (Copper Special Edition) alongside the BTD 600 Bluetooth dongle in India. The ACCENTUM Wireless SE, equipped with hybrid active noise cancellation (ANC), is a premium audio solution for those seeking exceptional sound quality and connectivity.

Pricing and Availability

The ACCENTUM Wireless SE, bundled with the BTD 600, is priced at ₹13,990. It is available for purchase exclusively on Sennheiser’s website and Amazon.

The BTD 600, priced separately at ₹5,990, is also available on the same platforms. This Bluetooth dongle enhances connectivity for Sennheiser Bluetooth-enabled devices, offering aptX audio codecs and low latency.

Key Features of ACCENTUM Wireless SE

The ACCENTUM Wireless SE is designed with 37mm drivers for clear, immersive audio. It offers Bluetooth 5.2 and multipoint connectivity, making it easy to connect with smartphones and laptops.

  • Hybrid ANC: Blocks out external noise for a distraction-free experience.
  • 50-Hour Battery Life: Ensures extended use without frequent charging.
  • Transparency Mode: Allows ambient sounds when needed.
  • Customisable Audio: Features modes like Bass Boost and Podcast mode for personalised sound preferences.
  • Five-Band Equaliser: Fine-tunes the audio output based on user preferences.

BTD 600: Enhancing Connectivity

The BTD 600 Bluetooth dongle simplifies connectivity for Sennheiser Bluetooth-enabled devices by providing aptX audio codecs and Bluetooth 5.2. It ensures seamless pairing and low-latency audio, ideal for watching videos and making calls on a PC or Mac.

Conclusion

With its rich features and competitive pricing, the ACCENTUM Wireless SE offers a premium audio experience, making it a strong contender in the wireless headphone market.

wp:postmeta.wp:meta_value: Sennheiser releases ACCENTUM Wireless SE with BTD 600 Bluetooth dongle in India at ₹13,990. Get details on features, pricing, and availability.

boAt Ultima Prism Smartwatch: Design and Display

Its IPX5 water and dust resistance makes it reliable for indoor and outdoor workouts. Available in trendy color options, the boAt Ultima Prism Smartwatch is a statement piece on your wrist that combines style with flexible functionality.

Connectivity and Battery

With Bluetooth calling, the boAt Ultima Prism Smartwatch allows you to answer calls from your wrist. Its impressive battery life means you can go through daily activities without frequent charging. Fast Bluetooth pairing and a user-friendly interface make it easy to stay connected on the go.

Best Deals and Pricing

Flipkart Big Billion Days Offers

Conclusion

With discounts on Amazon and Flipkart, now is the perfect time to buy the boAt Ultima Prism Smartwatch. Don’t miss out on limited-time offers for the ultimate blend of style, functionality, and value!
