item.title: techBAR Lumbar Massager: Targeted Relief for Back Pain
item.dc:creator: divyanshsharma7117
item.content:encoded:
If hours spent at a desk have your lower back in knots, techBAR’s lumbar massager may be just the solution. Available now at Selfridges, this innovative device combines heat, vibrations, electrical impulses, and gentle traction to relieve tension and ease muscle pain.

Key Features of the techBAR Lumbar Massager

  • Advanced Pain Relief: Combines heat therapy, targeted vibrations, and electrical impulses to relieve pain and support healthy posture.
  • Customized Comfort: Adjustable intensity levels allow for a personalized experience, so you can hit just the right spot for soothing relief.
  • Compact & Easy to Use: Designed for home or office use, this massager fits easily on any chair and is perfect for on-the-go pain relief.

Priced at Selfridges, the techBAR lumbar massager provides instant, customizable comfort, helping you relax and focus on what matters.

wp:postmeta.wp:meta_value: Discover techBAR’s advanced lumbar massager with heat, vibrations, and electrical impulses for effective back pain relief

item.title: Amazon Echo Hub: The Essential Smart Home Command Center
item.dc:creator: divyanshsharma7117
item.content:encoded:
With Amazon’s latest innovation, the Echo Hub, managing your smart home has never been easier. Acting as a central control unit, this Alexa-enabled device syncs with all your Amazon smart home gadgets, offering seamless control over everything from lights and cameras to locks and thermostats.

Key Features of the Amazon Echo Hub

  • All-in-One Control: Manage smart lighting, security cameras, locks, heating, and more, all from one convenient interface.
  • Alexa-Enabled Commands: Hands-free voice control powered by Alexa to streamline daily tasks and automate routines.
  • Enhanced Security: Lock and unlock doors or monitor cameras directly from the Hub, boosting home security.

At £169.99 on Amazon, the Echo Hub is a game-changer for anyone looking to streamline their smart home setup, making advanced home automation truly accessible.

wp:postmeta.wp:meta_value: Discover the Amazon Echo Hub, the central control for your smart home, connecting all Alexa-enabled devices in one place. Available now at Amazon .

item.title: Discover How iRobot Vacuums Bring Next-Level Cleaning to Your Home
item.dc:creator: divyanshsharma7117
item.content:encoded:
iRobot: The Future of Effortless Home Cleaning

iRobot's advanced vacuum cleaners transform cleaning, making it hands-free and efficient. Designed to map and navigate your home autonomously, these robotic vacuums target hard-to-reach spots, such as under beds and sofas, to ensure thorough cleaning without you lifting a finger.

Why Choose iRobot Vacuum Cleaners?

  • Smart Mapping Technology: These vacuums adapt to your home layout, learning routes to clean every nook and cranny effectively.
  • Time and Effort Saver: Set it and forget it—save time by letting the device handle daily cleaning, especially in tough-to-reach areas.
  • Customizable Features: Choose from models with advanced filters, spacious bins, and specialized corner-cleaning features to meet your home’s needs.

Key Factors to Consider

Before purchasing, look into features like filtration type, bin size, and corner cleaning capabilities. These ensure you select a model that maximizes cleaning power while catering to your home’s unique needs.

wp:postmeta.wp:meta_value: iRobot's advanced vacuums redefine home cleaning with mapping, efficient corner cleaning, and smart navigation. Explore features for a spotless home.

item.title: XUPERMASK: The High-Tech Face Mask with Built-In Headphones
item.dc:creator: divyanshsharma7117
item.content:encoded:
The XUPERMASK High-Tech Face Mask takes protective wear to new heights by merging technology and style in a way that redefines personal gadgets. Created with input from tech icon will.i.am, XUPERMASK not only filters air but also integrates built-in headphones for seamless audio. This sleek mask is complete with LED lights for night visibility and three-speed fans to keep you cool, making it the perfect addition to modern-day essentials.

Key Features of XUPERMASK

  • Integrated Headphones: Enjoy music and take calls directly from your mask, offering convenience like never before.
  • LED Lighting: Navigate dark environments with in-built LEDs designed for safety and style.
  • Cool Air Fans: Adjustable three-speed fans circulate fresh air, adding comfort to long wears.

Blending futuristic functionality with urban aesthetics, the XUPERMASK is more than a mask—it's a next-gen wearable for those who demand more from their gear.

wp:postmeta.wp:meta_value: Discover XUPERMASK—a face mask with integrated headphones, LED lights, and fans. Experience ultimate style and function with this innovative wearable.

item.title: Rocketbook Flip Reusable Digital Notepad: Eco-Friendly Digital Note-Taking
item.dc:creator: divyanshsharma7117
item.content:encoded:
The Rocketbook Flip Reusable Digital Notepad offers a modern twist on traditional note-taking by allowing users to digitize handwritten notes and sketches seamlessly. Compatible with iOS and Android, the Rocketbook Flip lets you scan and upload notes to your preferred cloud service, creating a smart, paperless workflow.

Even better, it’s reusable—just wipe it clean with water and a cloth. Compatible with Pilot FriXion pens, markers, and highlighters, this notepad is perfect for students, professionals, and creatives who want to be eco-friendly without compromising their love for handwriting.

Key Features of the Rocketbook Flip

  • Digitize Handwritten Notes: Easily upload to your phone or cloud service.
  • Eco-Friendly and Reusable: Just wipe off with water and reuse.
  • Versatile Writing Tools: Works with any Pilot FriXion pen, marker, or highlighter.

The Rocketbook Flip Reusable Notepad is an ideal solution for sustainable note-takers who want convenience without waste.

wp:postmeta.wp:meta_value: Go digital with the Rocketbook Flip Reusable Notepad, which lets you save and erase notes, making it ideal for eco-conscious professionals.

item.title: Cala Health Secures $50M to Expand Tremor Therapy
item.dc:creator: divyanshsharma7117
item.content:encoded:
Cala Health, a California-based bioelectronic medicine company, has raised $50 million in an oversubscribed growth funding round. The funds will help expand its FDA-cleared TAPS therapy, a wearable solution for essential tremor patients.

Funding Details

Investors Involved:
The funding round was co-led by Vertex Growth Fund and Nexus NeuroTech Ventures, with participation from existing investors, including:

  • Johnson & Johnson Innovation
  • GV (Google Ventures)
  • Lux Capital
  • Action Potential and others.

The strong backing underscores growing investor confidence in Cala Health’s innovative tremor therapy solutions.

What Is Cala TAPS Therapy?

Cala Health specializes in wearable neuromodulation technology for chronic diseases. Its flagship product, the Cala kIQ System, addresses essential tremor through transcutaneous afferent patterned stimulation (TAPS) therapy.

Key Features:

  • FDA-Cleared: Provides non-invasive tremor relief.
  • On-Demand Therapy: Allows users to manage tremors when needed.
  • Data Insights: Offers users the ability to track progress over time.

Essential tremor affects millions globally, causing involuntary shaking that disrupts daily life. Cala's wearable device offers a cutting-edge, drug-free alternative.

What’s Next for Cala Health?

The $50 million funding will support:

  1. Commercial Expansion: Accelerating the rollout of TAPS therapy, especially after a positive Medicare Coverage Determination.
  2. Awareness Building: Enhancing visibility among patients and healthcare providers.
  3. Broader Reach: Expanding access to its technology for essential tremor patients.

"We’re thrilled with the strong support from new and existing investors who believe in our vision to revolutionize tremor relief with on-demand, wearable technology," said Deanna Harshbarger, CEO of Cala Health.

Conclusion

Cala Health’s $50M funding marks a pivotal moment for wearable medical technology. By scaling its TAPS therapy, Cala aims to transform tremor treatment, empowering patients with effective, non-invasive solutions.

wp:postmeta.wp:meta_value: Cala Health raises $50M to boost commercialization of its TAPS therapy, enhancing wearable solutions for essential tremor patients.

item.title: Wearable Brands Bet on Repeat Customers Amid Market Slump
item.dc:creator: divyanshsharma7117
item.content:encoded:
Amid a decline in wearable device sales, companies like Noise and Boult are shifting strategies to target repeat customers and premium upgrades. The market slowdown, characterized by sluggish smartwatch and earphone sales, has pushed brands to innovate and deepen their existing product offerings.

Noise Focuses on Premiumisation

Noise, the market leader in smartwatches with a 27.4% share, reported a net loss of ₹20 crore in FY24, as competition eroded profitability. Co-founder Amit Khatri emphasized the need to increase average selling prices (ASPs) by catering to advanced users and launching premium products.

“We’re focusing on specific user cohorts like health, fitness, and productivity to drive growth,” Khatri said. Noise also aims to enhance sensor accuracy and application capabilities for targeted use cases.

Boult Sees Upgrade Trends

Boult observed a strong upgrade trend, with consumers transitioning from wired earphones to neckbands and True Wireless Stereo (TWS) devices. Despite revenue growth of 40% to ₹697 crore in FY24, Boult’s profits declined to ₹2.4 crore.

Co-founder Varun Gupta highlighted an 81% customer retention rate, showcasing a loyal customer base driving the upgrade cycle.

Market Challenges and Future Outlook

The wearable market has seen its second consecutive quarterly decline, especially in smartwatches, due to extended replacement cycles and rising inventory. Brands like Noise and Boult remain optimistic, focusing on innovation and deeper customer engagement.

With competition easing, Noise anticipates growth through premium, health-focused products tailored to evolving user needs.

wp:postmeta.wp:meta_value: Wearable companies like Noise and Boult target repeat buyers and premium upgrades to revive growth amid market slowdown.

item.title: Imec Joins AR Alliance to Boost Augmented Reality Wearables
item.dc:creator: divyanshsharma7117
item.content:encoded:
Imec Joins AR Alliance for AR Wearable Innovation

PISCATAWAY, N.J., Dec. 18, 2024 – The Interuniversity Microelectronics Centre (imec) has officially joined the AR Alliance as a non-profit member. This collaboration aims to accelerate the development of augmented reality (AR) wearable devices, fostering a robust ecosystem for AR hardware innovation.

Advancing AR Together

The AR Alliance provides a neutral platform where companies of all sizes collaborate to develop groundbreaking AR technologies. Members work collectively to create processes and solutions that enhance AR wearables, delivering meaningful user experiences.

Dr. Bharath Rajagopalan, Chair of the AR Alliance, emphasized the collaborative mission:

“The AR market has immense potential for everyone to thrive together. Imec’s addition brings unparalleled expertise, further propelling innovation across the AR supply chain.”

About the AR Alliance

Founded by major industry players like STMicroelectronics, META, Google, and Qualcomm, the AR Alliance fosters a non-competitive environment. Its flexible membership supports organizations at all stages, ensuring diverse voices are heard in advancing AR technology.

About imec

Celebrating 40 years of innovation, imec leads microchip research globally, shaping industries such as health, mobility, energy, and data technologies. As a world-renowned "chip lab," imec drives innovation in vital application areas, pushing the boundaries of what technology can achieve.

wp:postmeta.wp:meta_value: Imec joins the AR Alliance to drive innovation in augmented reality wearables. Together, they aim to unify and expand the global AR ecosystem.

item.title: UPI to Expand to 6 More Countries by 2025
item.dc:creator: divyanshsharma7117
item.content:encoded:
MUMBAI, Dec. 18, 2024 – NPCI International Payments (NIPL), a subsidiary of the National Payments Corporation of India (NPCI), plans to extend the Unified Payments Interface (UPI) to four to six additional countries by 2025. This move aims to make UPI accessible in regions frequented by Indian travelers, such as Qatar, Thailand, and Southeast Asia.

Expanding Global Reach

UPI is currently operational in seven countries, including Bhutan, Nepal, Singapore, and France. With international adoption on the rise, NIPL’s CEO, Ritesh Shukla, highlighted the ongoing efforts to boost UPI's global presence. Speaking at the Moneycontrol Fintech Conclave, Shukla stated:

“We aim to go live in 3–4 new countries in 2025 and potentially six, depending on project completion timelines.”

Building Awareness Abroad

Efforts are underway to create awareness among merchants and customers in existing markets. NIPL is also collaborating with Indian banks and fintechs to ease UPI adoption abroad, including providing user notifications at six international airports.

Future Collaborations

Beyond UPI expansion, NIPL is partnering with countries like Peru, Namibia, and Trinidad and Tobago to develop payment systems modeled after India’s real-time payment network.

What’s Next?

As UPI expands into more global markets, it strengthens India’s position as a leader in digital payments. This initiative promises seamless transactions for Indian tourists and a growing ecosystem for international partners.

wp:postmeta.wp:meta_value: UPI may go live in 6 new countries by 2025, including Qatar and Thailand. NPCI aims to make UPI accessible in key regions for Indian tourists.

item.title: South Korea Develops Iron Man-Inspired Wearable Robot
item.dc:creator: divyanshsharma7117
item.content:encoded:
SEOUL, Dec. 23, 2024 – Researchers from the Korea Advanced Institute of Science and Technology (KAIST) have unveiled the WalkON Suit F1, a groundbreaking exoskeleton designed to help paraplegics walk, climb stairs, and navigate daily obstacles.

Revolutionizing Mobility

This lightweight wearable robot, weighing 50 kg and powered by 12 electronic motors, mimics human joint movements. Sensors analyze 1,000 signals per second to predict the user’s intentions, ensuring balance and stability. Equipped with "eyes" to detect stairs and obstacles, it offers paraplegics a new level of independence.

Inspired by Iron Man

Park Jeong-su, a KAIST researcher, drew inspiration from Iron Man:

“I thought it would be amazing to help people with a robot in real life.”

Demonstrated Success

Kim Seung-hwan, a paraplegic and KAIST team member, showcased the suit’s capabilities, walking at 3.2 km/h, climbing stairs, and sliding into a bench. Kim won gold in the exoskeleton category at Cybathlon 2024.

“This suit lets me stand and walk, something I wanted to share with my son,” Kim shared.

A New Era for Assistive Robotics

With advanced AI, titanium-aluminum construction, and real-world usability, the WalkON Suit F1 represents a major leap forward in assistive technology. It empowers users to live more active lives and paves the way for future innovations.

wp:postmeta.wp:meta_value: KAIST develops WalkON Suit F1, a wearable robot helping paraplegics walk, climb stairs, and navigate obstacles with advanced sensors and AI.

item.title: Google Android 16 DP2 Released: New Features & Updates
item.dc:creator: divyanshsharma7117
item.content:encoded:
December 23, 2024 – Google has launched Android 16 Developer Preview 2 (DP2), offering developers a sneak peek into upcoming features and APIs. This preview focuses on performance enhancements, better battery life, and exclusive new capabilities for Pixel devices.

Key Features in Android 16 DP2

1. Screen-Off Fingerprint Unlock
Pixel owners can now unlock their devices using the in-display fingerprint sensor, even when the screen is off. This feature is currently exclusive to devices with ultrasonic fingerprint readers, like the Google Pixel 9 Pro.

2. Improved Battery Life
Android 16 DP2 promises significant battery optimization, reducing power consumption while enhancing app performance.

3. Enhanced Haptics
New haptic APIs allow developers to fine-tune vibration effects with customizable frequency and amplitude curves, delivering richer feedback across supported devices.

4. Adjustable Refresh Rates
Building on Android 15, Android 16 DP2 simplifies app integration with dynamic refresh rates, improving performance consistency.

Availability

Android 16 DP2 is currently available for developers on supported Pixel devices. However, certain features, like the Screen-off Fingerprint Unlock, are hardware-dependent.

What’s Next?

Google aims to release Android 16 earlier in 2025 to coincide with the launch of the Pixel 10 series. Developers are encouraged to test these new features and provide feedback.

Stay tuned for more updates as Google continues to refine Android 16.

wp:postmeta.wp:meta_value: Googl Android 16 DP2 is out! New features include Screen-off Fingerprint Unlock for Pixel devices, better battery life, richer haptics, and improved APIs.

item.title: RTX 5060 VS 4060: World's apart or just a pocketgrab?
item.dc:creator: divyanshsharma7117
item.content:encoded:
What do the leaks say?

With CES around the corner, Rumors are spreading fast regarding Nvidia RTX 5060 laptop GPU. Leaked 3DMark Time Spy scores suggest a 21% performance improvement in contrast to RTX 4060 and a slither above 5070.

Leaked Benchmarks: What is the performance?

RTX 5060 scores 13821 points in 3DMark Time Spy, while passing RTX 4060's 11,451 and edging out the RTX 4070's 13,391. This boost does not signify additional power consumption, thus being a good choice for energy efficient laptops.

But, The question regarding total graphic power remains a mystery as of yet. The model tested may have used or not used the full 115W TGP, leaving room for doubts and its true numbers.

The VRAM Problem

Despite the numbers, the 8GB VRAM might raise concern. Modern AAA games require much more than 8GB which might affect long term experience for gaming. This challenge also poses a dilemma of for the desktop RTX 5060, which could disappoint gamers anticipating some remarkable performance bumps.

What can you expect from CES 2025?

Nvidia will likely unveil RTX 50 series during CES 2025, which includes all the variants. Many laptop manufacturers like MSI and ASUS, will showcase their next-gen machines with these next-gen GPUs.

While RTX 5060 showcases a promising performance boost, its limited VRAM may disappoint gamers who are hoping for future proof solution.

Stay tuned for CES announcements to get the full updates for RTX 50 series.

wp:postmeta.wp:meta_value: The RTX 5060 laptop GPU outpaces the RTX 4060 with a 21% boost in performance. However, its 8 GB VRAM might limit its potential in demanding AAA games.

item.title: OnePlus 13R Gets Major Camera Enhancements
item.dc:creator: divyanshsharma7117
item.content:encoded:
The OnePlus 13R is set to make waves in the midrange smartphone market with significant upgrades to its camera hardware. Leaks suggest the device will deliver better photography features than its predecessor, the OnePlus 12R.

Key Camera Upgrades

According to leaker Yogesh Brar, the OnePlus 13R will feature:

  • 50MP Sony LYT-700 main lens: With a 1/1.56-inch sensor and stacked CMOS technology.
  • 50MP Samsung JN5 telephoto lens: Capable of 2x optical zoom, replacing the underwhelming 2MP macro lens.
  • 8MP ultrawide camera: Retained from the OnePlus 12R.

This setup marks a clear shift toward versatile and higher-quality cameras. The JN5 telephoto lens promises sharper zoom capabilities, a much-appreciated upgrade over the largely unused macro lens from previous models.

Selfie and Other Specs

The 16MP selfie camera remains unchanged from the OnePlus 12R. However, the OnePlus 13R will likely shine in other areas, with a Snapdragon 8 Gen 3 chipset, 6,000mAh battery, and thin form factor enhancing overall usability.

Conclusion

With these camera enhancements and premium features, the OnePlus 13R promises to be a strong contender in the midrange smartphone market. Keep an eye out for the official launch to learn more.

wp:postmeta.wp:meta_value: The OnePlus 13R boasts major camera upgrades, including a 50MP main lens and telephoto sensor, replacing the outdated macro lens for better performance.
